title: Experienced Product & Ads Researcher (Ecommerce Dropshipping)
description:
The Role

We are looking for an experienced product researcher in ecommerce dropshipping to consistently find high-quality products using
 Ads Library. Your main responsibility is to identify products that meet our criteria and are ready to test or scale, with an expected output of 2–3 approved products per day. Additional ad research may be required for selected products.



Key Requirements

You should have a strong ability to use
 Ads Library to find and analyze products, along with solid product validation skills to ensure you are identifying real opportunities, not random or low-quality finds. This role is focused on consistency, and you must be able to reliably deliver 2–3 approved products every day. You must also be organized and able to document your research clearly, while ensuring all daily submissions are completed on time.



To Apply

 your application with the subject line: Product & Ads Researcher – Ads Library. Include a short 30–60 second video introducing yourself, examples of products you’ve researched, and your rate (per product, per hour, or monthly fixed).

title: E-commerce Video Editor + AI Content Creator (DTC / Meta Ads)
description:
We're a fast-growing DTC e-commerce brand scaling on Meta Ads. We're looking for a Video Editor / AI Content Creator to own our ad creative pipeline — someone who's already edited winning ads for e-commerce brands and knows what converts cold traffic.



You'll be editing short-form ads (UGC + static-to-video + AI-generated content) for
, Instagram, and TikTok. You'll work inside a structured process with clear briefs, hook libraries, and creative testing frameworks — not guessing what to do next.



WHAT YOU'LL DO

- Edit ad variations from UGC footage, stock, and AI-generated b-roll

- Create AI b-roll and visuals using tools like Runway, Kling, Veo, Midjourney, ElevenLabs, HeyGen

- Cut hook variations, CTAs, captions, and text overlays based on our testing framework

- Follow our SOPs: brief ? rough cut ? review ? final export ? upload to 

- Iterate fast on winning ads (new angles, new hooks, new b-roll)

- Respect naming conventions, folder structure, and delivery deadlines



MUST-HAVE

- 2+ years editing e-commerce / DTC ads (Meta Ads, TikTok Ads)

- Portfolio with at least 3 winning ads you can point to (spend history a plus)

- Fluent with Premiere Pro OR CapCut Pro (one of them mastered)

- Hands-on experience with AI video/image tools (Runway, Kling, Veo, Midjourney, Sora, etc.)

- Strong sense of offer, hooks, and short-form retention

- Comfortable working inside processes, Slack/Notion/Asana, clear briefs

- Reliable, communicates proactively, meets deadlines

- Fluent written English



NICE TO HAVE

- Experience with health / wellness / kids / parenting niches

- Motion graphics (After Effects)

- Basic copywriting for captions and text overlays

- Experience with 
 or similar review tools



WHAT WE OFFER

- Long-term role with a stable team

- Clear processes, clear briefs, no micro-management

- Performance bonuses on winning ads

- Direct feedback loop with the founder

- Growth path: lead editor ? creative strategist as we scale



HOW TO APPLY

Please send:

1. Your portfolio (3–5 best e-com ads you've edited — link to the live ad if possible)

2. One example of AI b-roll you've created (link + which tool used)

3. Your current AI stack (which tools you use daily)

4. A short description of the process you operated in at your last e-com role: how briefs were delivered to you, how many ads/variations you were expected to produce per week, what review/feedback loop looked like, and which tools you used to deliver

5. Your expected salary (mouthly and per video)



Applications without a portfolio will be ignored.

title: Project-based Articulate 360 Course Creator (4-6 weeks)
description:
We’re looking for a project-based Articulate 360 Course Creator to join our remote team (duration: 4-6 weeks, with the potential to move into a full-time role if the project demand persists. 



About Us

We are a US-based company managing digital projects across education, media, and publishing. We work with proactive, detail-oriented tea
mbers who take ownership, communicate clearly, and deliver consistent, high-quality work in a remote setup.



Responsibilities

- Build and draft eLearning courses using Articulate 360 (Storyline and/or Rise)

- Design clean, engaging course layouts using sound instructional design principles

- Structure content with clear learning objectives, logical flow, and learner-focused pacing

- Apply visual hierarchy, interactions, and layouts to improve comprehension and retention

- Organize modules, lessons, and assessments for clarity and usability

- Implement feedback and revisions efficiently

- Ensure course quality, consistency, and completion by deadlines

- Proactively suggest layout or learning experience improvements



Requirements

- At least 1 year of experience using Articulate 360 or a similar platform

- Understanding of instructional design fundamentals (learning objectives, content sequencing, assessments)

- Strong eye for clean, concise, and visually organized layouts

- Detail-oriented, organized, and deadline-driven

- Able to work independently and self-direct in a remote environment

- Reliable, responsive, and consistent with follow-through

- Experience working with US-based teams is a plus



Hours & Pay

- Hours: 40 hours/week (8 hours per day)

- Schedule: Dayshift PH Time (7 hours) with 1 hour US overlap

- Rate: $6.50 USD/hour

- Full-time potential



How to Apply

- Apply through OnlineJobs.ph

- Include resume + portfolio or samples of Articulate 360 courses you’ve created

- Answer the mandatory screening questions below

- Applications without answers to the screening questions will not be considered.



Screening Questions

- How much experience (years/months) do you have working remotely for a US company?

- This role requires strong written communication. Write 3–4 sentences explaining why you’d be a good fit for this position.

- Provide links or samples of Articulate 360 courses you’ve personally built.

title: E-commerce Media Buyer — Meta Ads (DTC / Scaling)
description:
We're a fast-growing DTC e-commerce brand scaling on Meta Ads. We're looking for a Media Buyer who's already scaled DTC brands profitably on Meta and knows how to operate inside a structured testing framework — not someone who's going to "try things" on our ad account.



You'll own the day-to-day of our Meta Ads account: launching tests, managing budgets, killing losers fast, scaling winners, and feeding creative learnings back to the team. You'll work inside a clear process with daily/weekly rituals, testing frameworks, and reporting dashboards.



WHAT YOU'LL DO

- Launch and manage Meta Ads campaigns (ASC, CBO, ABO) across TOF / MOF / BOF

- Run structured creative testing: new hooks, new angles, new formats every week

- Monitor KPIs daily (CPA, ROAS, CTR, CPM, thumbstop, hold rate) and act on them fast

- Scale winning campaigns aggressively while protecting account stability

- Kill underperformers early based on clear data thresholds — no emotional attachment to creatives

- Coordinate with the creative team: brief what to produce next based on data

- Build and maintain reporting (daily scorecards, weekly reviews, creative performance reports)

- Spot account issues early (fatigue, audience saturation, delivery shifts) and react

- Follow our SOPs for naming conventions, campaign structure, and testing cadence



MUST-HAVE

- 2+ years managing Meta Ads for DTC e-commerce brands

- Proven track record scaling at least one brand past $50k/month ad spend profitably (screenshots or case study required)

- Deep understanding of Meta's current algorithm behavior (ASC+, Advantage+, attribution)

- Fluent with structured testing frameworks (hook testing, angle testing, creative matrix)

- Comfortable reading data: pivoting ad-level performance, identifying fatigue, diagnosing drops

- Strong written English, proactive communication

- Works inside processes — Slack/Notion/Asana, clear briefs, clear reporting

- Reliable, accountable, doesn't disappear when numbers drop



NICE TO HAVE

- Experience with TikTok Ads and/or Google Ads (PMax, Search, YouTube)

- Experience in health / wellness / kids / parenting niches

- Familiarity with Triple Whale, Northbeam, or similar attribution tools

- Experience feeding creative briefs to editors based on ad data

- Knowledge of advertorial / long-form funnel strategies



WHAT WE OFFER

- Long-term role with a stable team

- Clear processes, clear briefs, no micro-management

- Performance bonuses tied to profitable scaling

- Direct feedback loop with the founder

- Growth path: media buyer ? head of acquisition as we scale



HOW TO APPLY

Please send:

1. A case study of one DTC brand you scaled on Meta: starting spend, peak spend, CPA/ROAS evolution, how long it took, what you did specifically (screenshots required — blur brand names if needed)

2. Your current testing framework: how you structure new tests weekly, how you d
 what to kill vs scale, what KPIs you gate decisions on

3. A short description of the process you operated in at your last e-com role: how campaigns were structured, what reporting cadence you followed, how you coordinated with the creative team, what volume of tests you ran per week

4. Your current tech stack (ad account tools, attribution, reporting)

5. Your expected salary

6. In the first line of your reply, write: "I read the full job post" — we filter out copy-paste applicants.



Applications without proof of past performance will be ignored.

title: Web Developer for Interactive Real Estate Parcel Map (Leaflet / Mapbox / CMS Admin)
description:
Please only apply if you have actually built an interactive map website or real-estate listing site before.



We are a U.S.-based land company selling vacant land parcels online. We will have a main website built and managed by a separate company, but we want to build a separate subdomain specifically for our available parcels for sale. This subdomain must feel visually consistent with the main website, including similar branding, colors, typography, layout style, and general user experience, because consistent branding across subdomains improves user trust and cohesion. 



We are looking for a skilled web developer with experience building interactive map-based websites for real estate, listings, directories, or GIS-style projects.



The new subdomain will serve as our parcel inventory website. It should display a U.S. map with parcel markers/flags showing available parcels for sale. Users should be able to zoom in, click markers, and open parcel profile/listing pages.



Most importantly, this must be built so our internal admin team can manage the parcel listings without needing a developer each time. That means we should be able to add parcels, remove parcels, edit parcel descriptions, edit listing details, update terms/conditions, change parcel status such as available or sold, and manage core listing content through an admin system or CMS. Real-estate CMS workflows commonly support dynamic listing management and status updates, which is the type of setup we want here. 



What We Need Built:



A branded subdomain website connected to our main company brand.



Design that closely matches or mirrors the style of the main site.



Interactive U.S. parcel map with clickable markers.



Zoom in/out map functionality.



Parcel detail/listing pages.



Mobile-friendly responsive design.



Admin functionality for internal staff to manage parcel listings and content.



Easy workflow so non-technical employees can update listings without coding.



Coordination with our existing hosting/SEO team so the subdomain works properly within our overall web setup.



Admin / CMS Requirements:

Your solution must include an easy admin system for our team. Our employees need to be able to:



Add new parcel listings.



Remove parcel listings.



Edit parcel descriptions.



Edit parcel details such as price, acreage, location, APN, terms, status, photos, and listing content.



Update parcel terms and conditions or financing details.



Mark parcels as sold, pending, or inactive.



Control what appears on the interactive map based on listing status.



We are open to a lightweight CMS, Airtable, Google Sheets, Webflow CMS, custom admin panel, or another simple editable solution, as long as it is reliable and easy for staff to use. CMS-connected map and listing systems are commonly used for dynamic real-estate inventory and map-driven sites.



Required Skills:



Strong front-end web development skills.



Experience building interactive map-based websites.



Experience with Leaflet, Mapbox, MapLibre, Google Maps JavaScript API, or similar mapping tools.



Experience building real-estate, property listing, directory, or map-based websites.



Ability to create a site that matches the branding of an existing website/subdomain environment.



Experience connecting websites to editable CMS or admin systems.



Strong communication and attention to detail.



Preferred Skills:



Experience with parcel, land, GIS, or real-estate projects.



Experience with subdomain deployments.



Experience working alongside an outside hosting/SEO team.



Good understanding of clean UI/UX and mobile responsiveness.



Important Requirements:



Do not apply if your solution requires us to hire you every time we want to add, remove, or edit a parcel.



We want this built so our admin staff can manage listings internally.



Please recommend the simplest and most reliable setup for this project.



We prefer a solution that does not require an unnecessarily complicated custom backend unless there is a clear reason.



Deliverables:



Fully functional subdomain website.



U.S. parcel map with interactive markers.



Branded parcel detail/listing pages.



Admin/CMS system for internal staff.



Staff ability to edit parcel descriptions, terms, parcel details, and statuses.



Training document or short Loom video showing our team how to update listings.



To Apply, Please Send:



3 examples of map-based, real-estate, or listing websites you built.



A short explanation of what tech stack you would use for this project.



Whether you recommend Leaflet, Mapbox, MapLibre, or another map system.



Whether you recommend Airtable, Google Sheets, CMS, or a custom admin panel for our team.



Your estimated timeline.



Your hourly rate or fixed-price quote.



Include the word “parcelmap” in your application so we know you read the full post.

title: Sales expert
description:
Sales Representative Test Task – MKB Media Solutions

Welcome,

This test is designed to assess your ability to initiate conversations and generate leads for MKB Media Solutions.

As a Sales Representative, your role will be to connect with potential clients and open the door for new business opportunities through effective outreach.

The Goal

At MKB Media Solutions, we help businesses improve their online presence and attract more customers through media mentions.

Your responsibility will be to reach out to potential clients, start meaningful conversations, and create interest in our services.

The Test

Instructions:

Please complete the following two tasks. Keep your responses clear, concise, and natural. We are looking for messages that feel human and effective, not overly scripted.

Cold Outreach (DM)

Write a short cold DM to a business owner (e-commerce brand) introducing our services.

Your goal is to start a conversation, not a hard pitch, personalize the message, and spark curiosity and interest.

Warm Outreach (Referral Message)

Write a message you would send to a friend, acquaintance, or connection asking for referrals.

Your goal is to keep it low-pressure, make it easy for them to help, and sound natural and genuine.

Evaluation Criteria

Your responses will be evaluated based on relevance, clarity, effectiveness, tone and style, and creativity.

We are looking for messages that fit the situation, are easy to understand, and would realistically get a response. Your tone should feel human, confident, and professional while still standing out.

Additional Information

You may use AI tools, but your final answers should feel authentic and personal. Keep responses short and to the point, and focus on real-world effectiveness.

Deadline

April 18, 2026.

Submission

Please submit your responses to both tasks along with your CV.



Good Luck!!

title: Accounts Receivable Specialist (Billing & Collections)
description:
We're looking for an **Accounts Receivable Specialist** to own the invoicing, collections, and AR function for an industrial cleaning company that has been serving commercial and industrial clients across the New York tri-state area for over eight decades. This role exists to free up the owner to focus on sales and product development, and that only works if you can run the billing and collections operation independently and without hand-holding.



You will manage invoicing, follow up on outstanding balances, set up new vendors, and work directly inside QuickBooks Online and Monday CRM. You will also be a point of contact for customers calling about billing questions, which means your English communication skills need to be clear, confident, and professional. Experience doing this for a commercial service business is required, not preferred.



Why You'll Want to Join



- You will be paid in USD (bi-monthly: every 15th and 30th)

- Paid Time Off in accordance with company policy

- Observance of Holidays per company guidelines

- 100% remote setup so you can work wherever you're most productive

- Direct impact on cash flow and business operations from day one

- Small team environment where your work has immediate visibility



What You'll Work On



Invoicing and Billing



- Generate and send invoices to commercial and industrial clients accurately and on time

- Maintain organized billing records and ensure invoices reflect correct pricing, terms, and job details

- Support the migration of historical billing data from Workflow into QuickBooks Online

- Keep billing workflows clean, consistent, and up to date inside QuickBooks Online



Collections and AR Management



- Follow up on outstanding invoices and overdue accounts through phone and

- Manage the full collections cycle from initial follow-up through resolution

- Track aging reports and prioritize collections activity based on account status

- Communicate professionally and clearly with clients to resolve billing disputes and collect balances



Vendor Setup and Administrative Support



- Set up new vendors in QuickBooks Online and maintain accurate vendor records

- Coordinate with the owner on vendor terms, documentation, and onboarding requirements

- Support basic bookkeeping tasks as skill level allows, with potential to take on more over time



CRM and Systems Management



- Maintain accurate records inside Monday CRM alongside QuickBooks Online

- Keep both systems current and flag any discrepancies between platforms

- Support process improvements as the business scales toward higher volume



What You Bring



- Proven experience handling invoicing, billing, and collections specifically for a commercial service business

- Direct industry background in commercial cleaning, field service, trades, or a similar service environment

- Strong proficiency in QuickBooks Online including invoicing, AR management, and vendor setup

- Clear, professional English communication skills both written and spoken, customer phone calls are part of this role

- High attention to detail and a track record of following through on outstanding balances without being managed

- Comfort working independently in a small business environment where you own your function

- Familiarity with CRM tools, Monday CRM experience is a plus

- Self-directed and organized with the ability to manage multiple open accounts simultaneously



Nice to Have



- Experience supporting a commercial cleaning, field service, or trade business at a deeper level beyond basic familiarity

- Basic bookkeeping experience beyond AR and collections

- Familiarity with data migration or transitioning billing records between platforms



## How to Apply



Please include:



1. Your **updated resume**

2. A **short Loom video (1 to 2 minutes)** introducing yourself, describing your experience handling invoicing and collections for a commercial service business, and explaining how you manage overdue accounts from first follow-up through resolution



**Only candidates who submit a Loom video will be moved to the next step of the hiring process.**



If you are organized, dependable, and comfortable owning the full billing and collections cycle for a commercial business without needing step-by-step direction, this role gives you direct ownership and real impact inside a business that has been built on trust and reliability for over eighty years.

title: B2B Sales Representative – Food Processing Equipment (Remote, Full-Time)
description:
We are a European company selling industrial food processing machines (€5,000–€100,000) to clients in Europe, the USA, and Australia. We're expanding our sales team and looking for a driven representative who wants to grow their income through real results.

Learn more about us and what we sell before applying: 



How the pay works



Base salary: €400/month — guaranteed

KPI bonus: €400/month for hitting activity targets (cold calls made, offers sent, CRM kept up to date)

Commission: Added after your trial period, based on closed deals

Hit your sales plan: €1,200–1,500/month total

Top performers at 6–12 months: €2,000–3,000+/month



The plan is realistic. We set it to be achievable, not to frustrate you.



What you'll do



Prospect and cold call leads from our database across Europe, USA, and Australia

Respond to incoming customer inquiries — fast response time is critical (target: within 1 hour, ideally within 5 minutes)

Send product offers and follow up consistently to close deals

Maintain Pipedrive CRM accurately and daily

Guide clients from first contact through to purchase

Participate in video calls and occasional trade show support

This is a split-shift role covering multiple time zones (Europe, USA, Australia). You won't work 24 hours — but your schedule will be spread across different parts of the day. Flexibility and reliability during your assigned windows is essential.



What we're looking for



At least 1 year of sales or outbound calling experience

Strong English — written and spoken clearly

Comfortable on the phone, persistent, and professional

Fast to respond — you take customer reply time seriously

Self-managed, honest, and organized in a remote setting

Motivated by earnings — you want your effort to show in your paycheck



Bonus: Experience in B2B, technical or industrial products, or Pipedrive CRM



Training & onboarding

We provide 1.5 weeks of structured onboarding covering our sales process, products, and machines. You don't need to know food processing equipment — we'll teach you. You need to know how to sell and how to follow up.



Important — please read before applying

We are hiring 3–5 candidates for a paid trial period. After the trial, we keep the best performers for long-term positions with full commission structure. We're transparent about this because we want people who see it as an opportunity, not a risk.

If you're consistent, coachable, and hungry to earn — you'll do well here.

Please visit 
 before applying.

title: Social Media Engagement Specialist
description:
ABOUT THIS ROLE

We are looking for a Social Media Engagement Specialist who is serious about remote work and ready to take full ownership of our online community from Day 1.



Inner World Training is a coaching business that helps coaches, course creators, and entrepreneurs build profitable mission-driven businesses. We're building a global Courageous Movement — and we need someone who believes in the power of connection to help us lead it.

WHAT YOU WILL DO

, and LinkedIn — respond to comments, DMs, and messages within 2-4 hours during engagement hours

- Identify, curate, and amplify client transformations and user-generated content

- Track engagement metrics and provide weekly community health reports

- Support product launches and campaigns with coordinated engagement strategies

- Represent Inner World Training's warm, empowering brand voice in every interaction

- Flag community concerns and opportunities to leadership proactively



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

- 1-3 years of hands-on community management or social media engagement experience

- Strong written English communication — warm, authentic, and brand-aligned

- Ability to represent a brand voice correctly without scripts for every situation

- Comfort with ambiguity and the ability to handle sensitive community situations with maturity

- Resourcefulness — you figure things out when information is incomplete



WHO WILL THRIVE IN THIS ROLE

We are looking for someone who:

- Takes ownership — does not wait to be told what to do or how to respond

- Is resourceful — finds solutions when information is incomplete

- Communicates clearly and proactively about any blockers or concerns

- Treats deadlines as commitments, not suggestions

- Genuinely loves building communities and helping people feel like they belong



If you need constant supervision, templated responses for every situation, or you're not passionate about the coaching/entrepreneur space — this role is not the right fit.



HOW TO APPLY

- FILL UP THIS FORM: 

IMPORTANT: DO NOT SEND A GENERIC APPLICATION MESSAGE.



TO BE CONSIDERED, YOUR APPLICATION MESSAGE MUST:

1. BEGIN WITH THE PHRASE "Courage Creates Movement"

2. INCLUDE A BRIEF PARAGRAPH ABOUT WHY THIS ROLE IS THE RIGHT FIT FOR YOU SPECIFICALLY



APPLICATIONS THAT DO NOT FOLLOW THESE INSTRUCTIONS WILL NOT BE READ.



We are serious about this role and we expect the same from you.

If you are serious — we look forward to hearing from you.

description:

 and Instagram.

mbers.

AI Integration: Use AI tools to speed up asset generation while maintaining high brand standards without losing the human touch.

Collaborate: You’ll be the "connective tissue" between our Video, Social Media, and Tech teams.



Technical Requirements

Adobe Creative Suite Mastery: 3+ years of professional experience in Photoshop and Illustrator. You must be comfortable with high-end photo manipulation and vector creation.

Canva Proficiency: Ability to work quickly in Canva for templated assets and social posts.

AI Design Workflow: Proven experience using generative AI tools (e.g., Midjourney, Adobe Firefly, or Leonardo) to enhance creative output.

Design Aesthetic: A portfolio demonstrating a clean, sophisticated, and modern aesthetic. We value white space, high-end typography, and "Quiet Power" over loud or cluttered designs.

The Hidden Test: We value attention to detail. In the application form below, the very first question will ask for the sum of 14 + 6. Please ensure your answer is correct.

Execution Speed: Ability to manage multiple projects and deliver first drafts within a 24-48 hour window.



The Benefits:

title: Assistants to Find Clients for Wellness Digital Product (Nervous System Balance)
description:
Product Overview

Our service generates a personalized wellness report: Your Nervous System Balance.

It’s a simple, ready-to-sell digital product that analyzes your current state using self-assessments (anxiety, cognitive state, sleep) + HRV data + sleep quality.

The result is a clear snapshot showing your current state and what to focus on.



Who is this for?

Fitness and biohacking consultants, wellness centers, psychologists.

They can provide the report to their clients as an additional service.



Why is this useful?

A personalized report, Your Nervous System Balance:

 Shows which functional systems matter most right now.

 Matches supplements to your current state (smart supplement choice).

 Helps identify the most relevant therapy — which direction is better for you.



How cooperation works

 We provide report codes (1 code = 1 paid report).

 Partners share codes with their clients or use them themselves.

 Codes are free — payment after completing the data form.

 Use the code when completing the data form (enter the code instead of alias).

 We handle everything else (processing, delivery, etc.).

Partners focus only on outreach and sales — we handle everything else.



How it works (for end users)

 Complete the data form and enter your code in the alias field.

 Receive a personal CNS Profile (digital delivery within 24 hours).

 See which functional systems matter most for smart supplement choice.



Two ways of cooperation:

 Finding verified clients

 Direct product sales



DM with:

Which way you earn: outreach (lead generation) / wellness report sold (service sold).

For more details: CNS Profile Report preview, video explaining how it works, demonstration of completing the data form.

title: Paid Media Specialist
description:
About the Role



As a Paid Media Specialist (Meta Ads), you will act as the execution engine behind our paid social channel across multiple high-volume, design-led brands.



This is a hands-on, platform-focused role where you will be responsible for building, launching, and maintaining Meta ad campaigns with a high level of precision and consistency. You will work closely with the Senior Marketing Manager and Head of Performance Marketing, translating fully briefed creative assets into clean, structured, and correctly configured campaigns.



This role is best suited for someone who thrives in execution-focused work, values accuracy, and is confident operating inside Meta Ads Manager on a daily basis.





Key Responsibilities

Campaign Building



Build campaigns, ad sets, and ads using fully briefed creative assets

Configure all campaign elements accurately, including objectives, audiences, placements, budgets, schedules, and tracking

Use AI tools to generate on-brand ad copy (headlines, descriptions, and CTAs)

Apply strict naming conventions consistently across all accounts and funnel stages (TOFU, MOFU, BOFU)

Publish campaigns and confirm successful launch with the Senior Marketing Manager

Identify and flag any asset specification issues, disapprovals, or delivery concerns immediately

Ensure all builds are accurate and require no rework

Budget Adjustments & Campaign Maintenance



Execute budget changes, reallocations, and optimizations as directed by the Head of Performance Marketing

Pause, activate, and duplicate campaigns, ad sets, or ads as instructed

Implement adjustments to placements, schedules, or audiences when required

Monitor campaign delivery and flag any irregularities such as spend drops, disapprovals, or account-level alerts

Platform Hygiene & Quality Assurance



Perform daily account health checks across all ad accounts

Maintain clean and structured campaign architecture (no duplication, misconfigurations, or orphaned assets)

Ensure pixel tracking and UTM parameters are correctly implemented on all campaigns

Enforce strict naming conventions across all builds

Provide regular updates or summaries to the Senior Marketing Manager via Slack 



Other Responsibilities



Complete additional tasks and platform-related requests as assigned

Maintain accuracy and attention to detail across all campaign builds and updates

Communicate proactively when issues, blockers, or uncertainties arise

Contribute to maintaining a structured, efficient, and high-performing ad account environment





About You



Minimum of 3 years’ hands-on experience using Meta Ads Manager on a daily basis

Strong experience managing multiple ad accounts or brands simultaneously

Deep understanding of campaign setup, including objectives, audiences, placements, and budget optimisation

Highly detail-oriented with a strong focus on accuracy, naming conventions, and tracking setup

Able to execute quickly while maintaining a high standard of work

Comfortable working as an execution-focused tea
mber, following clear direction

Strong communication skills with the ability to raise issues and ask clarifying questions when needed

Experience in e-commerce or home, renovation, or lifestyle brands is an advantage





Finer Details

Schedule: Part-time (1 day per week / 8 hours)

Start Date: TBD

title: Customer Service Admin - Solar
description:
Company Overview



We are a fast-growing company seeking a highly organized, dependable, and customer-focused Customer Service Admin to help manage daily operations, support customers, coordinate appointments, and keep internal systems running smoothly. This is a key position for someone who can communicate professionally, stay organized, and handle multiple tasks efficiently.



Position Summary



The Customer Service Admin will manage customer communication, CRM systems, onboarding, scheduling technicians and sales appointments, administrative support, and process organization. The ideal candidate must be professional, detail-oriented, and fluent in spoken and written English.



Key Responsibilities



Customer Service & Communication



* Answer inbound calls,
s, and text messages professionally

* Speak clearly and confidently with customers

* Provide updates, resolve concerns, and deliver excellent customer support

* Follow up with leads, customers, and open service requests

* Maintain a friendly and professional attitude at all times



CRM Management



* Navigate CRM systems daily

* Enter and update customer information accurately

* Track leads, appointments, service calls, and sales progress

* Maintain organized notes and records



Customer Onboarding



* Guide new customers through the onboarding process

* Collect required documents and account information

* Explain next steps, timelines, and expectations clearly

* Ensure a smooth and professional customer experience



Scheduling & Coordination



* Schedule technicians for service appointments

* Schedule sales consultations and follow-ups

* Coordinate calendars for staff and customers

* Confirm appointments and send reminders



Administrative Duties



* Write and update company Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs)

* Organize files, reports, and internal documents

* Assist leadership with daily administrative tasks

* Improve systems and workflow processes

* Prepare spreadsheets and reports as needed



Requirements



* Must speak excellent English with strong verbal communication skills

* Must write professional English in
s and messages

* Previous customer service or administrative experience preferred

* Experience using CRM software

* Strong organizational and multitasking skills

* Ability to solve problems independently

* Reliable, punctual, and professional

* Strong computer skills (Google Workspace, Microsoft Office, scheduling tools)



Preferred Experience



* Dispatch or technician scheduling

* Sales support

* SOP creation and operations management

* Service-based business experience

* Solar Customer Support Experience



Compensation



* Competitive pay based on experience

* Growth opportunities available



Schedule



* Full-time / Part-time available

* Flexible based on business needs



To be considered: Sent an
 to 
 with

title: Executive Assistant
description:
Big potential, Long-term role

Executive Assistant (Remote, Full-Time)



Full-Time | Monday–Friday, 10:00 AM–6:00 PM EST



Apply here:



Join an established USA-based company as an Executive Assistant supporting an Executive in a fast-paced, high-demand environment. This role requires a proactive “to-do” attitude—candidates must take initiative rather than wait to be told what to do. This is a full-time, hands-on role requiring real-time communication and active engagement throughout the day. Limited training will be provided, so the ideal candidate must be self-starting and resourceful.



The Executive Assistant will support the Executive with all assigned tasks, ensuring smooth operations across administrative, financial, HR, and project-related areas.



__________



What You’ll Do:



Provide day-to-day support, manage calendars, meetings, travel, and daily priorities.



Draft and manage
s, proposals, and follow-ups; communicate professionally with clients, vendors, contractors, and employees across the company in real time.



Assist with billing, purchase orders, invoicing, and financial tracking.



Support HR tasks including onboarding and workers’ compensation documentation.



Monitor and update project boards, track deadlines, and organize files, templates, and SOPs.



Conduct data analysis and support special projects with a proactive approach.



Assist with any additional tasks assigned by the Executive, adapting to changing priorities as needed.



__________



What We’re Looking For:



Proven experience supporting senior leadership as an Executive or Virtual Assistant.



Previous experience working with USA-based culture companies.



Proficient in Microsoft Office and Google Workspace tools.



Advanced Excel skills and financial/bookkeeping experience.



Exceptional organizational abilities and attention to detail.



Excellent written and verbal communication skills to interact professionally with both internal and external stakeholders.



Comfortable in a fast-paced, high-demand environment with real-time communication.



Proactive, resourceful, and able to anticipate needs before being asked.



Self-starter who can thrive with limited training and a hands-on, take-charge approach.



__________



What We Offer:



Stable, full-time role with growth potential in an established USA-based company.



Direct collaboration with executive leadership and opportunities to influence operations and strategy.



Comprehensive training on internal systems (limited training provided; proactive approach required).



Professional, supportive, and respectful team environment.



________________________________________________________________________________



If you are a proactive, self-starting professional who thrives in a fast-paced environment and can support an Executive with any tasks in real time, this role is for you.



Apply here:

title: E-commerce Product Listing Specialist (International Market, Weekly Pay)
description:
Job Description

We are a Hong Kong–based e-commerce business selling collectible toys and hobby products to international customers through platforms such as eBay and Shopify. We are looking for a detail-oriented E-commerce Product Listing Specialist from the Philippines to help us create, optimize, and maintain product listings for foreign markets (US, Europe, etc.).



You should have prior experience listing products on e-commerce platforms (eBay, Amazon, Shopify, or similar), understand how to write clear English titles and descriptions, and be comfortable working with images, basic keywords, and simple spreadsheets.



Responsibilities

 - Create new product listings on eBay/Shopify (and other marketplaces when needed), including titles, descriptions, categories, tags, and prices.

 - Research competitor listings and keywords to improve visibility and conversion for international buyers.

 - Upload and organize product photos, do basic image cropping/renaming when required (no advanced design needed).

 - Follow our listing templates, naming rules, and brand tone, while suggesting improvements when you see opportunities.

 - Maintain accuracy of product data (SKU, barcode, attributes, measurements, condition, etc.).

 - Communicate with the owner via chat/email, provide daily/weekly progress reports, and respond within agreed working hours.



Requirements

 - At least 1–2 years of experience working with e-commerce product listings (eBay, Amazon, Shopify, Lazada, Shopee, or similar).

 - Good written English; able to write clear, simple, and customer-friendly product titles and descriptions for international markets.

 - Familiar with basic keyword usage (SEO mindset) for product titles and bullet points.

 - Comfortable using spreadsheets (Google Sheets/Excel) to manage product data and do bulk updates.

 - High attention to detail, organized, and able to follow step?by?step SOPs.

 - Stable internet connection and a reliable computer.



Nice to Have (Plus)

 - Experience specifically with collectible toys, model cars, Beyblades, figures, or similar hobby products.

 - Experience working with international e-commerce (US/UK/EU buyers).

 - Basic image editing skills (e.g., Photoshop, Canva, or similar).



Work Schedule & Pay

 - Position: Part-time

 - Work hours: 4 hours for Mon to Fri. Flexible, but with some overlapping hours with Hong Kong time for communication.

 - Payment frequency: Weekly pay via PayPal/Payoneer (to be agreed).



How to Apply

Please send us:

 - A short introduction about yourself and your e-commerce listing experience.

 - Which marketplaces you have worked on (eBay, Amazon, Shopify, Shopee, etc.).

 - 2–3 sample listings or portfolio links (screenshots or URLs).



Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted for a test task.

description:
BUILD MEANINGFUL PARTNERSHIPS AND DRIVE GROWTH



We are seeking a sophisticated and proactive A.c.c.o.u.n.t M.a.n.a.g.e.m.e.n.t leader to join our growing agency. If you excel at bridging the gap between client visions and creative execution, we want to meet you. We value "Partners," not just "Employees."

Oversee project lifecycles to ensure deadlines and quality standards are exceeded.



Identify opportunities for account expansion and long-term retention.

title: Senior Paid Media Specialist (Google Ads + Meta) - Long-Term, Part-Time to Full-Time
description:
Hi! We're Avengr, a small US-based digital marketing and web design studio based in Franklin, Tennessee. We're hiring a Senior Paid Media Specialist to join our team long-term.



This is a stable, long-term role. We're looking for someone we can build a real working relationship with, not a short project. You'll start at around 20 hours per week, with a clear plan to scale to full-time hours within the first few months based on fit and performance.





ABOUT THE ROLE

?????????????????????????????



You'll own Google Ads and Meta Ads campaigns for our client roster. You'll work directly with our founder and collaborate with our design, development, and SEO teammates (most of our team is also remote).





WHAT YOU WILL DO

?????????????????????????????



- Set up, launch, and optimize campaigns across Google Ads and Meta

- Install and debug conversion tracking (pixels, GA4, GTM, CAPI)

- Build clear weekly and monthly client reports

- Run strategy and full account audits for new and existing clients

- Handle keyword research, audience building, and ad copy direction

- Recommend landing page and CRO improvements

- Communicate directly with clients through
 (and occasional video calls)





WHAT YOU NEED TO HAVE

?????????????????????????????



- 5+ years of paid media experience across Google Ads and Meta

- A portfolio or case studies showing real results you can walk us through

- Experience managing client accounts with $5,000+ per month in ad spend

- Agency experience (not just in-house work)

- Fluent written and spoken English

- Strong working knowledge of GA4, Google Tag Manager, and pixel/tag debugging

- Real experience using AI tools (Claude, Gemini, ChatGPT, MCP servers) in your day-to-day work, not just experimenting with them





HOW WE WORK TOGETHER

?????????????????????????????



Our team values clear thinking and clear communication. The people who do well with us:



- Flag problems early, before they become emergencies

- Dig into the "why" behind a metric, not just the "what"

- Suggest solutions when they spot issues, not just descriptions

- Respond within reasonable timeframes and let us know when they'll be unavailable

- Take ownership when something breaks and work to fix it



If you enjoy being trusted to run accounts independently and you like thinking strategically, you'll feel at home here.





SCHEDULE & LOGISTICS

?????????????????????????????



- Hours: Starting at ~20 hours per week, scaling to full-time within the first few months

- Rate: $15-25 USD per hour, based on experience

- Schedule: Must have consistent overlap with US Central Time business hours (approximately 9pm-5am Manila time). We're flexible on the exact schedule, but core overlap is required for client communication.

- Payment: Weekly payments via your preferred method (Wise, PayPal, etc.)

- Engagement: Long-term. We're building a team, not hiring for one project.





HOW TO APPLY

?????????????????????????????



Please send your application with the following:



1. In the subject line, include the word "Franklin" so we know you read this post carefully.

2. A short paragraph about why this role interests you.

3. A link to your resume or LinkedIn profile.

4. One or two specific case studies or account examples with real numbers (screenshots are welcome, redact what you need to).

5. One specific example of how you've used an AI tool in your paid media work in the last 30 days.

6. Your typical availability during US Central Time business hours.



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed. We're looking for someone who reads carefully and follows directions. That habit matters in this role.



Thank you, and we look forward to reading your application.

title: E-Commerce Product Researcher
description:
About the Company

We are a company dedicated to delivering exceptional customer experiences. We believe it’s not just about the product  it’s about the connection customers build with our brand and the experience they remember.

Our team spans across different departments working collaboratively to scale the business and launch new products. As we continue expanding our portfolio and entering new niches, we are focused on building a strong pipeline of high-potential products backed by data, strategy, and market insight.

We are now looking for a data-driven and commercially minded  Product Researcher to support our product expansion and innovation efforts.



About the Role

The Product Researcher plays a key role in identifying new product opportunities and profitable niches for launch. This role is responsible for turning market data into actionable insights  helping the business make informed, strategic decisions on what to launch next.

You will work closely with the R&D Project Manager and cross-functional teams to validate ideas, assess market demand, and ensure each product opportunity aligns with our long-term growth strategy.





About You

You are analytical, curious, and commercially aware. You don’t just find products but you validate opportunities.

To excel in this role, you should have:

1–3 years of Amazon/Shopify product research experience

Strong data analysis skills with the ability to extract insights from large datasets

Solid understanding of Amazon/Shopify marketplace dynamics, trends, and customer behavior

Experience with competitor analysis and identifying gaps in the market

Strong keyword research capability for demand validation and listing optimisation

Proficiency in tools such as Helium 10, Jungle Scout, Keepa, and Seller Central

Advanced Google Sheets / Excel skills (formulas, data structuring, analysis)

Clear communication and presentation skills to translate data into decisions



Key Responsibilities

Market & Niche Identification

 Identify high-potential product opportunities based on demand, competition, and trends

Product Validation

Analyse sales data, seasonality, and market demand to validate product viability

Competitor Analysis

Evaluate competitors’ listings, pricing, reviews, and positioning to identify opportunities and gaps

Keyword & Demand Research

Conduct keyword research to assess search demand and inform product positioning

Profitability Analysis

Forecast pricing, margins, and cost structures to ensure viable and scalable products

Trend Monitoring

Stay ahead of emerging trends, category shifts, and Amazon algorithm changes

Sourcing Support

Provide insights and guidance on sourcing opportunities aligned with identified products





What Success Looks Like in this role

Consistently identifying high-quality, launch-ready product opportunities

Strong pipeline of validated product ideas aligned with brand strategy

Data-backed recommendations that lead to profitable product launches

Clear, structured research reports that support fast decision-making



What’s in It for You

???? Competitive salary: $550 per month

 ???? Fully remote, full time role but available between 10-2 Romanian time for cross collaboration. 

 ???? 10 days PTO + 5 sick days (after 6 months)

 ???? Birthday bonus: $50



How to Apply

If this role excites you, we’d love to hear from you - Please apply here :

title: Senior Amazon PPC Manager – Remote (Full-Time)
description:
Senior Amazon PPC Manager – Remote (Full-Time)



You live and breathe Amazon Ads. You've scaled accounts from 6 to 7 and 8 figures. You don't just "manage PPC" – you build strategies that crush the competition.



If that sounds like you, keep reading. If not, this role is not for you.



About Us

We are Fox Performance, an Amazon PPC agency founded in 2018. We work mainly with German clients, but also serve international brands across Europe and the USA. Our clients come from every industry you can imagine – supplements, beauty, home & living, pet, electronics, fashion, baby products, and more.



We are obsessed with Amazon. We test everything, read every update, break down every new beta feature, and push our clients to results they didn't think were possible. No autopilot. No "set and forget". No agency BS.

Now we are looking for a Senior Amazon PPC Manager – someone who can take full ownership of a portfolio of accounts, think strategically, and mentor junior tea
mbers along the way.



Who We Are NOT Looking For

Let's be direct. Do not apply if:



You are looking for a short-term gig or just a "bridge job" until something else comes up.

You are working multiple jobs in parallel and trying to squeeze us in on the side. We need your focus. Period.

You don't want to grow, learn, and push yourself every single week.

You want to clock in, clock out and never go beyond the bare minimum.

You see Amazon PPC as "just a job" instead of a craft you want to master.

You can't take direct, honest feedback without taking it personally.



We're not for everyone – and that's okay.

Who We ARE Looking For

We are looking for a true A-Player. Someone who:



Wants to go full throttle and be one of the best in the game.

Treats client accounts like their own business.

Is hungry, curious, and obsessed with getting better.

Wants to grow with us long-term and build a real career.

Brings energy, ideas, and ownership to the table every single day.



If that's you – we'd love to meet you.



What You'll Own



Full Account Ownership: manage a portfolio of premium client accounts end-to-end – from strategy to execution to client communication.

Advertising Strategy: build PPC strategies across Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, Sponsored Display – and where relevant, Amazon DSP and AMC.

Launch & Scale: from new product launches to aggressive scaling of existing winners – you know when to push and when to defend.

Advanced Optimization: bid strategies, placement optimization, SKU-level profitability, TACoS management, dayparting, portfolio structuring – you go way beyond dashboard-level.

Account Audits & Strategic Planning: diagnose weaknesses, identify opportunities, build 30/60/90 day roadmaps for every account.

Client Communication: lead client calls, present results, push back when needed, be the trusted expert clients rely on.

Mentorship: help our Junior PPC Managers and Assistants grow – share your playbook, review their work, develop the next generation.

Process Development: help us build better SOPs, templates and internal tools – your experience shapes how we operate.

Stay Ahead: test new Amazon features, evaluate new tools, and bring fresh ideas to the team.





What You Must Know (Non-Negotiables)

These are the things you absolutely need to have under your belt as a Senior:



Deep mastery of all Sponsored Ads formats: Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands (incl. Video & Brand Store), Sponsored Display (incl. Audiences & Custom Creatives), and how they interact.

Campaign architecture: SKAG, single-keyword, theme-based, performance-based – you know which structure works when and why.

Advanced bidding strategies: dynamic bids, placement modifiers, top-of-search optimization, bid by placement, bid hijacking defense.

Keyword research & targeting: Helium 10 (Cerebro, Magnet, Frankenstein), Brand Analytics, Search Query Performance Report (SQP) – you can pull insights most managers miss.

TACoS vs ACoS: you understand the difference, when to optimize for which, and how to communicate it to clients.

Search Term Reports & Negative Mining: you build clean, performance-focused accounts without keyword cannibalization.

Brand Defense & Conquesting: you protect your client's branded search and attack competitors strategically.

Organic & Paid Synergy: you understand how PPC influences organic ranking (and vice versa) – BSR, indexation, halo effect.

Listing Fundamentals: you know that even the best PPC can't fix a bad listing – and you can identify what needs to change.

Reporting & Storytelling: you don't just deliver numbers – you tell the story behind them.

Bulk File Operations: you can edit, optimize and upload bulk files like a surgeon.

Tool Stack: Helium 10, Brand Analytics, Pacvue / Perpetua / Adtomic / Sellerboard or similar – at least one professional ad management tool you've worked with hands-on.

Bonus (high value): Amazon DSP, AMC (Amazon Marketing Cloud), Vendor Central, international marketplaces (US, UK, DE, FR, IT, ES).



If you read this list and thought "yes, that's me" – continue. If half of these are unfamiliar, this role is not the right fit yet.



What You Bring



4+ years of hands-on Amazon Advertising experience (agency or in-house), ideally managing multiple 6- and 7-figure accounts.

Proven track record of scaling Amazon accounts profitably – with real case studies you can walk us through.

Expert-level data analysis skills – Excel / Google Sheets is your playground; pivot tables, XLOOKUP, conditional logic are second nature.

Strategic mindset – you think in frameworks, not just dashboards.

Excellent English (spoken and written). German is a big plus, but not required.

Strong communication – confident in client calls, clear in writing, direct but professional.

Ownership mentality – fully accountable, no excuses.

Stable internet and a professional remote work setup.





What We Offer

You already know the foundation we offer (100% remote, MacBook, full-time, long-term, competitive USD salary, after one year: 13th month pay, 20 days PTO, paid sick leave, Philippine holidays...).





Ownership & Growth



Clear path to Team Lead / Head of PPC – we are growing, and senior hires are who we promote from.

Voice in strategy – you help shape how the agency operates.

Direct line to leadership – no middle management, no politics.

Conference & event budget – Amazon Unboxed, PPC events, industry conferences – we send you.

Annual learning budget – courses, certifications, books, coaches – you choose.



Time & Space to Do Great Work



Flexible hours – core overlap with German business hours (2–3 hours/day), the rest is yours.

Deep Work culture – no unnecessary meetings, no micromanagement.

Real team culture – weekly team calls, virtual coffee, and annual team events.



If you read the full text start your message with "HI WOLF"

title: Generative AI Specialist
description:
About the Role



We are looking for a talented and technically proficient Generative AI Specialist to join our 3D marketing team. In this role, you will be responsible for producing high-quality AI-generated images and videos that support our marketing campaigns, brand storytelling, and visual content pipeline. You will work at the intersection of creative art direction and cutting-edge AI tooling to deliver stunning 3D visual content at scale.



Key Responsibilities



- Generate, refine, and iterate on AI-produced 3D images and videos using industry-leading tools (e.g., Midjourney, Seedance 2.0, Kling 3.0, Sora, ComfyUI, etc.)

- Translate creative briefs and marketing objectives into clear, effective AI prompts and workflows

- Apply strong art direction principles to ensure all outputs are on-brand, visually compelling, and production-ready

- Build and manage node-based workflows (e.g., ComfyUI, Blender Geometry Nodes, Weavy AI or similar) to automate and customize AI generation pipelines

- Collaborate with creative directors, marketers, and 3D artists to align AI-generated content with campaign goals

- Edit, composite, and post-process AI-generated assets for final delivery across digital marketing channels

- Stay current with the latest AI image/video generation models, techniques, and tools

- Maintain an organized content library of assets, prompts, and workflow templates



Requirements Technical Skills



- Proficiency in AI image and video generation platforms (e.g., Midjourney, Seedance 2.0, Kling 3.0, Sora, ComfyUI, etc.)

- Strong working knowledge of node-based tools and workflows - experience with ComfyUI, Blender (Geometry/Shader Nodes), or similar node-based execution environments is essential

- Familiarity with 3D rendering concepts, lighting, materials, and camera composition as applied to AI generation

- Comfortable working with prompt engineering techniques - including negative prompting, LoRA/ControlNet inputs, and style referencing

- Basic post-production skills using tools such as Adobe Photoshop, After Effects, or DaVinci Resolve

- Creative & Art Direction

- Demonstrated ability to art direct AI-generated content, understands how to guide visual outputs toward a defined aesthetic, not just generate random results

- Strong eye for composition, color theory, typography integration, and brand consistency

- Ability to interpret creative briefs and translate them into a clear visual direction

- Portfolio showcasing AI-generated 3D marketing visuals (images and/or video)



Soft Skills



- Detail-oriented with a strong sense of visual quality control

- Able to manage multiple projects and deadlines in a fast-paced marketing environment

- Strong communicator, able to give and receive creative feedback constructively

- Self-motivated and proactive in exploring new tools and techniques



Nice to Have



- Experience with traditional 3D software (Blender, Cinema 4D, Unreal Engine)

- Background in motion design or video production

- Familiarity with AI upscaling and enhancement tools (Topaz, Magnific AI, etc.)

- Experience working within a brand or marketing agency context



What We Offer



- A creative and forward-thinking team environment

- Opportunity to work on high-impact 3D marketing campaigns

- Access to premium AI tools and subscriptions

- Continuous learning and growth in a rapidly evolving field

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
Position

Virtual Assistant (Operations, Marketing & Estimating Support)

Reports to: Owner – Christian Williams and Kristen Williams

Employment Type: Full-Time (Remote)

Industry: Landscape Design-Build & Installation

Location: Remote (PST availability)

About Williams Landscape Construction 

Williams Landscape Construction is a licensed, bonded, and insured Southern California landscape design-build company specializing in outdoor living projects, irrigation/drainage, outdoor kitchens, lighting, and full-scale installation projects. We use 

modern tools, automation, and AI to streamline operations and deliver a high-end customer 

experience from first contact to project completion.

We are seeking a proactive, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant who can support marketing, lead management, quoting workflows, client communication, and administrative operations.

Key Responsibilities but not Limited to: 

1. Lead Management & CRM (Jobber + GoHighLevel/Quo)

- Monitor incoming leads from Meta Ads, Google, website forms, SMS, and call tracking.

- Enter and maintain accurate customer records in Jobber.

- Set up quotes, follow-ups, tasks, and reminders.

- Trigger automated workflows (job follow-ups, review requests, estimate sequences).

- Assist in processing estimate transcripts from site visits (using pendant/AI tools).

- Organize client photos, videos, and transcripts.

- Send appointment confirmations and follow-up messages.



2. Quote Preparation Support

- Organize transcript notes into structured job scopes.

- Create material/plant lists and dimension breakdowns.

- Prepare worksheets for pricing.

- Upload estimates into Jobber.

- Send estimates once approved.



3. Client Communication

- Respond to inquiries via SMS,
, and messenger.

- Send updates, confirmations, and reminders.

- Request reviews and maintain review logs.

- Communicate using Williams Landscape Construction tone.



4. Administrative Tasks

- Organize Google Drive folders.

- Assist with permit paperwork.

- Maintain subcontractor lists and vendor catalogs.

- Track job progress and update dashboards.

- Assist with bookkeeping prep tasks.

Required Skills & Experience

- Strong English communication (written and verbal).

- Experience with Jobber, GoHighLevel, QuickBooks or similar CRMs.

- Comfortable with landscape/construction terminology.

- Highly organized; strong attention to detail.

- Proficiency in Google Workspace.

- Ability to work with PST schedule overlap.

Preferred (But Not Required) Skills & Qualifications

- Bachelor’s degree or Master’s degree in Business, Marketing, Communications, 

Architecture, Landscape Architecture, Construction Management, or a related field.

- Familiarity with ChatGPT or AI note-taking tools.

- Experience supporting contractors (landscaping, construction, HVAC, roofing, etc.).

- Knowledge of Orange County & LA County regions.

- Understanding of construction materials and plant types.

- Strong analytical skills for organizing transcripts and material lists.

- Experience with digital marketing or CRM automation.

KPIs (Performance Indicators)

- Response speed to leads & messages.

- Accuracy of data entry.

title: Yardi Voyager Systems Analyst
description:
I’m looking for a Systems Analyst to support the day-to-day administration, maintenance, and ongoing development of our internal systems. These systems are critical to property management, accounting, budgeting, and overall data operations.



In this role, you’ll be our go-to person for systems support and training, while also helping identify opportunities to improve and streamline processes and workflows across the business.



What You’ll Be Doing



- Handling Yardi-related support tickets and questions through our IT ticketing system (GoGenuity)

- Maintaining and troubleshooting core business applications, including servers, databases, hardware, and endpoints

- Working closely with me and the management team to improve processes, build automations, and streamline workflows

- Researching and testing new software versions, plugins, and system customizations

- Supporting third-party integrations with Yardi (e.g., budgeting tools, utility billback programs, resident screening platforms)

- Assisting with system training sessions (1:1, group sessions, demos, and workshops)

- Managing system-related tasks for onboarding/offboarding properties (acquisitions, transfers, or sales)

- Ensuring data integrity and compliance with data governance policies, especially around PII

- Creating and modifying reports using Yardi tools (SSRS, YSR, Custom Financial Analytics)

- Working closely with Yardi support to maintain the database and its modules

- Contributing to project planning and helping implement new systems or improvements



What I’m Looking For



- Strong experience with Yardi Voyager 7s (including modules and backend) — this is a must-have

- Experience with Voyager 8 / Elevate is a plus

- 4–6 years of experience in IT or systems analysis

- Advanced Excel skills and strong proficiency in Microsoft Office

- Experience working with enterprise-level systems and large-scale data/integration projects

- Solid understanding of data modeling, data warehousing, business intelligence, SSIS, and cubes

- Experience with query tuning, scripting, and program tracing

- Familiarity with programming languages like JavaScript or Python is a plus

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

- Ability to translate business needs into effective system solutions

- Strong communication skills and ability to work cross-functionally

- Detail-oriented with strong follow-through



Additional Details

- Full-time role (40 hours per week)

title: 2D Animator
description:
Job Title: 2D Animator (Rough + Clean Line Art) for Short-Form Videos – Ongoing Gig



Job Type: Freelance / Gig (Per Project, Ongoing)



Description:

We’re looking for a creative and reliable 2D Animator to handle the rough animation and clean line art for short, engaging 15-second videos on an ongoing basis.



This role focuses purely on animation and line work — our team will take care of coloring, shading, and final compositing. Perfect for animators who enjoy bringing motion to life without needing to handle the full production pipeline.



Our content is fun, expressive, and designed for short-form platforms, so a strong sense of timing, clarity, and movement is key.



Responsibilities:



Create rough sketches and clean line art animation (approx. 15 seconds each)

Animate within the range of 10–16 FPS, depending on the style

Ensure clean, readable line work ready for coloring

Follow provided concepts, references, and direction

Deliver animation files in an organized and editable format

Be open to feedback and revisions when needed



Requirements:



Proven experience in 2D animation (rough + clean-up)

Strong fundamentals in timing, spacing, and motion

Ability to produce clean, consistent line art

Experience with animation tools (Krita preferred)

Good communication and reliability with deadlines



Nice to Have:



Experience working in a team pipeline (handoff between animation ? coloring ? final render)

Familiarity with short-form / TikTok-style pacing

Ability to adapt to different styles (cartoony, 
-style, game-inspired)



Work Setup:



Project-based (we’ll reach out when we have videos ready)

Potential for long-term collaboration

Flexible schedule



Payment:



Php 2,000 – Php 2,500 per 15-second animation (Pay may change in time depending on how the project goes)

Covers rough animation + clean line art only (no coloring/rendering required)

Frame rate typically 10–16 FPS, depending on style and complexity



To Apply:



Send your portfolio/demo reel (showing rough + clean animation work) to 

Include a short introduction about your experience

(Optional) Share samples that show your line art cleanliness and motion quality



We’re looking for someone we can collaborate with long-term—if you enjoy focusing on animation and clean line work, we’d love to see your work!

title: Marketing Executive
description:
Marketing Executive

Company: Welltex

Location: UK

Employment Type: Full-time / Part-time 

About Welltex

Welltex is a growing company focused on delivering high-quality solutions to our clients. We are looking for a proactive and creative Marketing Executive to support and execute our digital marketing activities and help strengthen our brand presence across multiple channels.

Role Overview

The Marketing Executive will be responsible for managing and developing Welltex’s digital marketing activity across website,
, social media, database systems, and visual content creation. This is a hands-on role requiring creativity, organisation, and the ability to execute and improve marketing campaigns that drive engagement and growth.

Key Responsibilities

• Manage and update the company’s WordPress website, including content changes, page updates, and basic optimisation 

• Create and send regular
 campaigns (e-shots) to clients, including drafting content, formatting, and managing distribution lists 

• Use
 marketing tools such as Mailchimp, HubSpot, Sendinblue (Brevo), or similar platforms to design, schedule, and manage campaigns 

• Plan, create, and publish engaging content on LinkedIn and other social media platforms to promote Welltex’s brand, services, and updates 

• Connect with and grow Welltex’s social media audience, increasing followers and engagement across platforms 

• Work to increase Welltex’s visibility and performance on Google, improving views and online discoverability through basic SEO practices 

• Revise, maintain, and actively run the company’s marketing plan, ensuring campaigns are delivered effectively and continuously improved 

• Design and deliver a monthly news update for clients, distributed via social media and
 campaigns 

• Manage updates, maintenance, and amendments on the company database, ensuring data accuracy and consistency 

• Create graphic design content, including room shots, marketing visuals, and promotional assets for use across digital platforms 

• Ensure all digital content is consistent with brand guidelines and messaging 

• Monitor and report on performance of campaigns, including
, website, social media, database, and content engagement 

• Support wider marketing initiatives and ad-hoc projects as required 

Skills & Experience

• Experience using WordPress (or similar CMS platforms) 

• Familiarity with
 marketing tools such as Mailchimp, HubSpot, or Sendinblue (Brevo) 

• Experience with graphic design tools (e.g., Canva, Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator) for creating room shots and marketing visuals 

• Experience managing or updating CRM/database systems with strong attention to detail 

• Strong understanding of LinkedIn and other social media platforms for business growth 

• Good knowledge of basic SEO principles and improving online visibility 

• Excellent written communication and content creation skills 

• Strong organisational skills with the ability to manage multiple ongoing tasks 

• Basic understanding of digital marketing principles and campaign planning 

Desirable

• Experience with analytics tools (e.g., Google Analytics, LinkedIn Analytics) 

• Previous experience in a similar marketing role 

• Ability to produce high-quality visual content for property, interiors, or product-based marketing 

Personal Attributes

• Creative and proactive mindset 

• Strong attention to detail 

• Ability to work independently and take ownership of tasks 

• Motivated to grow brand awareness and engagement

title: Finance and Procurement Officer
description:
HIRING: Finance and Procurement Officer

Location: Chino Roces, Makati City

Work Arrangement: Full On-Site

 

 

Position Overview:

We are seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Finance and Procurement Associate to support the company’s financial and procurement operations. This role will be responsible for assisting in purchasing activities, monitoring financial transactions related to procurement, maintaining accurate documentation, and coordinating with vendors and internal departments to ensure efficient and compliant purchasing processes.

The ideal candidate should possess strong analytical skills, attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple administrative and financial tasks in a fast-paced environment.

 

 

Key Responsibilities:

- Process and monitor purchase requests, purchase orders, and procurement documentation in accordance with company policies and procedures.

- Source and coordinate with vendors and suppliers to obtain quotations, negotiate pricing, and ensure timely delivery of goods and services.

- Evaluate supplier quotations and recommend cost-effective procurement options.

- Maintain accurate records of purchases, invoices, receipts, and supplier agreements.

- Assist the finance team in processing accounts payable, payment requests, and expense tracking.

- Monitor procurement-related expenses and ensure alignment with approved budgets.

- Prepare and organize financial and procurement documentation for reporting and audit purposes.

- Coordinate with internal departments to ensure timely fulfillment of procurement needs.

- Ensure compliance with internal controls, financial regulations, and company procurement policies.

- Provide administrative and operational support to the Finance and Procurement Department as needed.

 

 

Qualifications:

- Bachelor’s degree in finance, Accounting, Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, or a related field.

- At least 1–2 years of experience in finance, purchasing, or procurement is preferred; fresh graduates are encouraged to apply.

- Strong proficiency in Microsoft Office applications, particularly Excel.

- Excellent organizational, analytical, and documentation skills.

- Strong communication and coordination skills when dealing with vendors and internal stakeholders.

- Ability to handle confidential financial information with professionalism and integrity.

 

Send us your resume via PM or

Position Overview:

We are seeking a motivated and results-driven EMR Sales Executive to promote and sell our Electronic Medical Records (EMR) solutions to healthcare providers, clinics, and medical institutions. The role involves identifying potential clients, presenting product solutions, building strong client relationships, and achieving sales targets.

The ideal candidate should have strong sales skills, excellent communication abilities, and a passion for technology solutions within the healthcare industry.

 

Key Responsibilities:

- Identify and develop new sales opportunities within hospitals, clinics, and healthcare organizations.

- Promote and demonstrate the company’s Electronic Medical Records (EMR) system to potential clients.

- Conduct product presentations, consultations, and sales meetings with healthcare professionals and decision-makers.

- Build and maintain strong relationships with doctors, clinic administrators, and healthcare managers.

- Prepare sales proposals, quotations, and contracts for clients.

- Manage the full sales cycle, from lead generation to closing deals.

- Achieve or exceed monthly and quarterly sales targets.

- Collaborate with the technical and implementation teams to ensure smooth system deployment and client onboarding.

- Maintain accurate records of sales activities and client interactions in the CRM system.

- Stay updated on healthcare technology trends and EMR industry developments.

 

Qualifications:

- Bachelor’s degree in business administration, Marketing, Healthcare Management, IT, or a related field.

- 1–3 years of experience in sales, preferably in healthcare, medical technology, SaaS, or software solutions.

- Strong sales, negotiation, and presentation skills.

- Ability to build relationships with healthcare professionals and decision-makers.

- Self-motivated with a target-driven mindset.

- Proficient in Microsoft Office and CRM tools.

 

Willing to conduct client visits and field sales activities when required.

 

Send us your resume via PM or

Company: By Lash Babe

Website:

Availability: 20 hours per week, open to full-time

Work Type: Freelancer

Niche: Beauty & Personal Care

Nice To Haves

title: Performance Marketing Specialist (Google Ads Focus) - Full-Time Remote
description:

This is a full-time, long-term opportunity to take ownership of global accounts and demonstrate your mastery of the Google ecosystem.



What You Will Do

Data Mastery: Go beyond the surface metrics. You will analyze GA4 and GTM data to understand the full customer journey and optimize accordingly.

The Ideal Candidate

The Analyst: Advanced knowledge of GA4, GTM, and conversion tracking. You don't guess; you use data to make decisions.



The Communicator: Exceptional written English. You can explain complex marketing concepts clearly and concisely.

What’s in it for You?

Stability: A dedicated full-time role with a consistent workload and long-term career path.



Flexibility: 100% remote work—work from the comfort of your home in the Philippines.

Application Process
