About the Role



We are seeking a detail-oriented and reliable Payroll & Financial Reporting Officer to support payroll processing and financial reporting across our childcare group. This role is suited to someone with strong payroll compliance knowledge, solid accounting and bookkeeping skills, and experience working across multiple entities.



The position manages payroll using Employment Hero and supports financial reporting in Xero, including BAS, GST reconciliation, intercompany bookkeeping, billing, and wages reporting.



Key Responsibilities



Payroll Processing (Employment Hero)

• Prepare and process end-to-end payroll for all staff within set deadlines.

• Manage payroll adjustments, corrections, and payroll-related enquiries.

• Ensure accurate calculation of wages, leave, allowances, and deductions.

• Maintain accurate payroll records in line with awards and legislation.



Payroll Compliance & ATO Submissions

• Ensure compliance with Australian payroll legislation, awards, and Fair Work requirements.

• Prepare and support ATO submissions related to payroll.

• Assist with payroll audits and compliance reviews as required.



Superannuation & Payroll Tax

• Process superannuation contributions accurately and on time.

• Prepare monthly payroll tax calculations and assist with lodgements.

• Reconcile payroll tax across entities and reporting periods.



Financial Reporting & Bookkeeping (Xero)

• Support financial reporting using Xero.

• Assist with BAS preparation and GST reconciliation for a group of entities (mandatory).

• Maintain accurate bookkeeping records across multiple entities.

• Support fortnightly bookkeeping and reconciliations.



Intercompany Bookkeeping & Billing

• Manage intercompany bookkeeping for staff costs, agency costs, and shared expenses.

• Record casual staff costs and agency costs to correct intercompany accounts.

• Maintain accurate intercompany journals, balances, and reconciliations.

• Support intercompany billing and complex cost allocations.



Wages, P&L & Management Reporting

• Prepare wages reports for management and finance teams.

• Support P&L and wages analysis across centres and entities.

• Assist with internal reporting to support budgeting and cost control.



Agency Invoicing

• Match agency invoices against approved timesheets and rates.

• Liaise with agencies to resolve discrepancies.



Skills & Requirements

• Strong experience in end-to-end payroll processing.

• Strong knowledge of Australian payroll legislation, awards, and compliance requirements.

• Experience with ATO submissions related to payroll.

• Strong accounting and bookkeeping knowledge.

• BAS and GST reconciliation experience for group accounts (mandatory).

• Experience with intercompany bookkeeping and multi-entity reporting.

• Intermediate to advanced Excel skills (formulas, pivots, reconciliations).

• High attention to detail and accuracy.

• Experience with Employment Hero (Payroll) and Xero (Financial Reporting).

• Strong time management and communication skills.

title: GoHighLevel Setup Specialist & Trainer
description:
We run an online coaching  business called Network Marketing School. We help network marketers grow their businesses through organic content, Instagram, and attraction marketing. We have an active client base, live programs, and a growing team.



We're moving our entire backend onto GoHighLevel and need someone who knows the platform inside out to set it up properly and train our team to run it independently.



What You'll Be Doing:

1. Funnel & Landing Page Setup



- Build multi-step funnels within GHL

- Set up landing pages for lead generation and promotional campaigns

- Ensure pages are mobile-optimised and load correctly

- Connect opt-in forms to the correct lists and workflows



2.
 Marketing



- Migrate or build our
 list inside GHL

- Set up tags, segments, and lists

- Build automated
 workflows and sequences

- Set up broadcast/campaign functionality for live promotions



3. CRM & Backend Operations



- Configure the CRM to track client data, statuses, and pipeline stages

- Set up custom fields to capture the KPIs and metrics relevant to our business

- Build simple dashboards or views so we can monitor performance at a glance

- Organise contacts, deals, and opportunities in a logical, clean structure



4. Training



- Once setup is complete, walk myself and our VA through how to use and manage everything

- Provide short Loom walkthroughs (or equivalent) for each section

- Be available for follow-up questions during a handover period



You're a Great Fit If You:



*Have hands-on experience setting up GoHighLevel for online coaches, course creators, or service businesses

*Have built funnels, automations, and CRM pipelines inside GHL (not just used it as a user)

*Communicate proactively and flag issues before they become problems

*Work independently without needing to be micromanaged

*Have examples or screenshots of past GHL builds you can share

*Experience migrating from other platforms (Flodesk, Leadpages etc.)



Project Scope:

This is a setup + training project. We expect the full build and training to take 2 to 4 weeks depending on your pace and availability. 



To Apply

Please answer the following in your application:



* How long have you been working with GoHighLevel?

* What types of businesses have you set it up for?

* Have you done team training after a GHL build before?

* What is your availability and estimated timeline to complete a project like this?



Applications without answers to these questions will not be considered.

title: Video Editor
description:
About the Role



We're looking for a talented and motivated Junior Video Editor to join our team and support our growing content operation. In this role, you'll work closely under our Senior Video Editor, contributing to a fast-paced mix of social media content, podcast production, video sales letters, and paid ad creative. This is a hands-on role with real responsibility from day one — ideal for someone who is hungry to grow, obsessed with storytelling through video, and thrives in a creative, agency environment.



How To Apply

- No cover letters. Just send us two things:

- Your portfolio: links to examples of your work (social content, ads, or anything you're proud of).

- A 1–2 minute Loom introducing yourself, why you want this role, and why you'd be a great fit for our team. Keep it tight, show some personality.



Key Responsibilities



Social Media Content

 • Edit short-form video reels for Instagram across two brands: the agency account and the founder's personal brand.

 • Handle a content mix that spans educational videos (tips, insights, agency expertise) and fun lifestyle content — you need to be comfortable switching between both.

 • Bring a genuine understanding of current social trends, 
s, and platform culture — we want content that actually feels native, not like it was made by someone who Googled 'viral video tips'.

 • Apply captions, motion graphics, transitions, music, and sound design to match the tone of each piece of content.

 • Adapt quickly to new formats and trending styles — if something is blowing up on the feed, you should already know about it.



Podcast Production

 • Edit occasional podcast episodes — trimming for flow, cleaning audio, and exporting in required formats.

 • Cut highlight clips and audiograms from podcast content for use across social channels.



Video Sales Letters (VSLs)

 • Edit VSLs for internal client training purposes within the agency.

 • Structure VSLs for maximum clarity and persuasion, incorporating B-roll, graphics, and text overlays as needed.

 • Ensure finished videos align with brand guidelines and project briefs.



Client Ad Support (META Ads)

 • Assist the Senior Video Editor in editing client ad creative for META 
 & Instagram) advertising campaigns.

 • Produce multiple cut-downs and variations of ad creative to support testing requirements.

 • Work within deadlines and handle revisions efficiently based on feedback.



Who You Are

 • You have a genuine eye for what makes video content stop the scroll.

 • You're detail-oriented — you notice the things others miss, and it shows in your work.

 • You take feedback well, iterate quickly, and don't take revisions personally.

 • You're proactive and can manage your own workload without needing to be micromanaged.

 • You're plugged into internet culture — you know your 
s, you're chronically online in the best way, and you bring that energy to the content you make.

 • You're a good cultural fit for a young, energetic team that works hard and doesn't take itself too seriously.

 • You're comfortable working in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment.



Requirements

 • 1–3 years of video editing experience (professional, freelance, or strong portfolio work).

 • Proficiency in the Adobe Suite is required — primarily Premiere Pro for editing, After Effects for motion graphics. Familiarity across the full suite is a plus.

 • Strong understanding of short-form content formats, especially Instagram Reels.

 • Experience with or strong understanding of paid ad creative (META ads preferred).

 • Solid grasp of pacing, colour grading, audio mixing, and motion graphics fundamentals.

 • Ability to handle multiple projects simultaneously and meet deadlines consistently.

 • A portfolio or reel demonstrating relevant editing work (social content, ads, or VSLs).



Nice to Have

 • Experience editing in an agency or content studio environment.

 • Familiarity with direct response video principles.

 • Basic motion graphics skills in After Effects.

 • Experience with podcast production tools (Descript, Audition, etc.).

 • Understanding of brand consistency across multiple content channels.



What We Offer

 • A creative, high-growth environment where your work genuinely matters.

 • Direct mentorship from a seasoned Senior Video Editor.

 • Exposure to agency-level client work, ad creative, and performance content.

 • Clear growth path as the team scales.

- Pay to be discussed on experience and availability

title: Customer Success VA
description:
We operate a product called WrenchFlow, a shop management app for independent auto repair shops. It is Software as a Service. When new users sign up for a free 14-day trial, most of them don't come back to the product enough to convert to paid. Your job is to fix that with our scripts. We provide automated training and have created a personal CRM for you to use along with Google Voice for the qualified leads.



This is an Activation Specialist Success role not sales, not support. The trial is already started. You're the human layer that calls new signups, walks them through onboarding, and gets them to send their first real invoice through the app after onboarding. That's the one metric that matters.



What You'll Do



Primarily outbound calls to warm leads and send SMS occasionally during calls to new WrenchFlow trial users (US-based auto shop owners)

Follow a structured 14-day, 7-call campaign per user based on where they are in the product

Check user activity data before every call to run the right script for each situation

Handle common objections — "I'm busy," "just
 me," "I already use something else"

Log every call outcome in our CRM (state, script used, callback time, next action)

Send follow-up SMS within 60 seconds of every call

Do technical support or troubleshoot bugs, only log the compliants

Make up information — if you don't know, you log it and escalate

Calls must happen during US business hours



Requirements

Clear, confident spoken English — American phone voice is a must

Experience making outbound calls (customer service, sales, appointment setting, or similar)

Comfortable following structured scripts and adapting in real time

Reliable internet and a quiet calling environment



Record a 60-second voice memo reading this script out loud in a natural, professional phone voice and attach it to your application with your resume.

title: Reddit Assistant
description:
ERVIEW

We’re hiring people to manage daily activity on Reddit, including posting content and interacting within communities. This is ongoing work and requires someone who actually understands how Reddit functions, not just how to scroll it.



You’ll need atleast 2+ devices (Android only). If you own multiple devices, that’s a plus and allows you to earn more. Expect roughly one hour of work per device each day.



Each day you’ll post content across several subreddits.



A critical part of this role is reading the room. The videos we provide can range from humorous to emotional to awkward or uncomfortable. You need to instantly recognize the tone and write posts that feel natural for that type of content. If you post everything the same way, you’ll fail.



You’ll also be responsible for finding appropriate subreddits for each video. That means reviewing community rules, understanding what performs well there, and making sure your post doesn’t look forced or out of place. If you can’t do that consistently, this position isn’t for you.



We’re looking for people who think independently, adapt fast, and don’t need their hand held. Prior Reddit experience is helpful but not mandatory if you learn quickly.



This is a long-term opportunity for dependable workers. Compensation is solid and can increase based on results and how many devices you use.



Earnings:

Most contributors earn $100–$500 per month, depending on consistency and the number of devices used.



Time Commitment:

Daily time commitment ranges from about 1 to 5 hours, depending on how many devices you’re using



To apply, include:

• how many devices you can work with

• your experience using Reddit

• when you’re available each day

title: Medical Tourism Sales & Client Coordinator

BeyondMed Group Ltd is a fast-growing international medical tourism company connecting patients from the UK, USA, Canada and France with world-class cosmetic surgery in Tunisia. We are a small, ambitious team now building our sales operation in Manila to expand into English-speaking markets.

title: Product Pricing & Competitor Research Analyst
description:
We’re looking for a detail-oriented and analytical person to join our team, focused on product pricing research and competitor analysis.

This role is ideal for someone who enjoys working with data, spotting trends, and turning numbers into clear insights and recommendations.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Research competitor pricing across major retailers (primarily via Google Shopping)

• Compare pricing across our product catalogue (FMCG: pet food, baby formula, household goods, etc.)

• Build and maintain structured Excel spreadsheets

• Use formulas, filters, pivot tables, and charts to analyse data

• Monitor pricing trends over time and highlight key changes

• Turn data into clear, actionable pricing recommendations

• Work with our internal systems to organise and track data

• Create clean, well-structured Excel files

• Present clear summaries of findings 

• Identify trends and pricing opportunities

• Provide practical recommendations



Requirements

• Strong Excel skills

o Formulas (VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP, IF, etc.)

o Pivot tables

o Data organisation and cleanup

o Basic charts/visualisation

• Experience with data analysis or pricing research

• High attention to detail

• Ability to work independently and think critically

• Comfortable doing repetitive research tasks accurately

• Good written English

• Experience in eCommerce or FMCG pricing

• Experience analysing competitor pricing

• Ability to suggest automation or process improvements



Role Details

• Full-time (5–8 hours per day)

• UK working hours (flexible within reason)

• Hourly rate to be discussed (depending on experience)





Important: Application Instructions

To apply, please complete the short task below and include it with your application.



Test Task:

1. Research these three products

o Alpro Oat Milk 1 Litre

o Aptamil 1 First Milk Formula 800g

o Whiskas Adult Cat Food Poultry in Jelly

2. Use Google Shopping to find at least 3 competitors for each product

3. Create a simple Excel sheet showing:

o Product name

o Your chosen “main” retailer price

o Competitor prices

o Price differences

4. Add a short summary (2–3 sentences per product):

o Is the main retailer overpriced or underpriced?

o What would you recommend?

Important:

• Keep it simple but clear

• Show your Excel structure and thinking



We’re looking for someone reliable, analytical, and comfortable working with data every day. If that sounds like you, apply with your test task.

title: Phone specialist (cold calling)
description:
I'm looking for someone to take phone calls for my outbound sales agency. We run outbound campaigns 
 + LinkedIn) for B2B SaaS clients selling into European ecommerce, and we need someone to handle the phone side — calling prospects who've shown interest, qualifying them, and booking demos with our client's sales team.



You'll be talking with ecommerce directors, heads of digital, and merchandising managers at mid-market online retailers across Europe. Most calls are warm: people who replied to our sequences, opened multiple
s, or asked a question we couldn't close over text. Your job is to have a real conversation, figure out if they're a fit, handle light objections, and get the right ones booked onto a demo calendar. Not a dialing-for-dollars role. Clear script and objection library provided, you don't need to know the product inside out on day one.



I'll need you to work CET (Central European Time), Monday to Friday, 10AM to 6PM. That's roughly 5PM to 1AM Manila time. I only want to hear from people who already work European or US hours and are comfortable long-term on a night shift — please don't apply if you're currently on a day schedule and planning to switch.



To apply

a. Tell me why I should hire you. Don't say "because I'm detail oriented and a hard worker", everyone says that. Tell me about a time you turned a cold or skeptical person around on a call, or a time you talked someone OUT of booking a meeting because they weren't the right fit.

b. Record a 60-second voice memo pitching yourself to me as if I were a prospect who just picked up the phone. Attach the audio file or a Google Drive link.

c. Tell me your internet speed (run a test at fast.com), the headset/mic you use, and whether your work environment is quiet enough for calls.

d. Make the subject of your application "Phone specialist - [your name here]"

e. Use 8AP for your application.

title: Job Application Virtual Assistant  — PM Roles (US Tech)
description:
About This Role I'm looking for a detail-oriented VA to manage a high-volume job search — applying to roles, doing targeted outreach to hiring managers, and helping prep for interviews. Milestone-based with real performance bonuses. I need someone organized, technically capable, and familiar with the US tech job market.



What You'll Be Doing



1. Company Research (Most Important) Before applying anywhere, verify the company is a good fit using public databases and research tools. I'll provide specific criteria in the onboarding doc. Only skip a role if the company clearly doesn't meet the criteria I outline.



2. Finding Roles Search across: LinkedIn (NO Easy Apply — always go to company career page), Indeed, Wellfound/YC Work at a Startup, Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, Workday, HiringCafe, and company career pages directly.



Target titles — be broad, if it sits at the intersection of tech, product, and process, apply:



Product Manager / Associate PM / APM

Product Operations Manager / Product Analyst

Business Analyst (product or tech-facing)

Strategy & Operations

Product Coordinator / Product Specialist

Project Manager / Program Manager / Technical Program Manager

Scrum Master / Delivery Manager (at tech companies)



3. Resume Tailoring + ATS Optimization (Required) Every submission needs a tailored resume — not optional.



Identify the top 8-10 keywords from the job description and mirror them in the resume where truthfully applicable

Reorder and use the STAR bullet points method to front-load the most relevant experience for that role

Run through an ATS checker (Jobscan.co or similar) — aim for 80%+ match before submitting

Never change dates, companies, degrees, or factual content — only wording and ordering

No tables, columns, text boxes, or graphics — clean ATS-friendly formatting only

Submit as .PDF unless the application explicitly requires .DOCX



4. LaTeX Resume Editing (Required) My resume is in LaTeX. You must be comfortable:



Opening and editing a provided .tex file

Making keyword and phrasing edits to bullet points without breaking formatting

Compiling to PDF using Overleaf

Naming each version clearly (e.g. Resume_PM_Stripe_2026.tex)

You don't need to be a LaTeX expert — but you must have used it before and know how to edit a .tex file and compile it. If you've never opened a .tex file, this role isn't for you.



5. Applying to Roles



Always apply on the company's career page — never LinkedIn Easy Apply

Log every application in the shared Google Sheet before moving to the next.

6. Hiring Manager Outreach After applying, find the HM or recruiter's name, LinkedIn URL, and work
 (Hunter.io, Apollo.io, or RocketReach). Draft a personalized outreach
 using my template. Log everything in the tracker and flag as "Ready to Send." Do not send — I send myself.



7. Interview Prep (Bonus) When I get an interview I'll request a research package: recent company news, Glassdoor questions for that role, HM background, main products, and a tailored Q&A prep sheet.

title: Senior Construction Admin / Operations Support (Australian Construction Experience Required)
description:
Please
: 



We are looking for an experienced and highly proactive Senior Construction Admin / Operations Support professional for a start-up Australian company.



We need someone who already understands how Australian construction businesses operate — someone who can bring structure, recommend systems, and help build efficient processes from the ground up.



This role may also support our existing cleaning company, so we are looking for someone adaptable, organized, and confident working across operations.



About the Role

This is not an entry-level admin role. We need someone who has already worked with Australian construction companies and understands the day-to-day operations, systems, workflows, and supplier/subcontractor coordination involved.



You will help:

- Set up and improve internal systems and processes

- Recommend tools, workflows, and admin structure

- Support construction-related operations

- Assist with documentation, scheduling, and coordination

- Bring ideas, knowledge, and initiative into a growing business

- Potentially support operations across both our construction and cleaning businesses



We are looking for someone who:

- Has previous experience working with an Australian construction company

- Understands construction admin, workflows, and operational support

- Is familiar with subcontractor coordination, supplier handling, and job-related documentation

- Knows the systems or software commonly used in the industry

- Can work independently and confidently in a senior support role

- Is proactive and can help implement better processes, not just follow instructions

- Is organized, detail-oriented, and solution-focused

- Communicates well and can support a fast-moving business owner



Key Responsibilities

Depending on experience, responsibilities may include, but are not limited to:

- Setting up admin and operational processes for the new construction company

- Assisting with job scheduling, coordination, and workflow management

- Supporting subcontractor and supplier coordination

- Helping organize documentation, records, and project-related admin

- Recommending systems, tools, and best practices used in construction businesses

- Supporting cross-business operations where needed

- Working closely with the business owner to create efficient systems that save time



Role Details



Position: Full-time

Work setup: Remote

Industry: Construction / Operations / Admin Support

Additional scope: May also support an existing cleaning business in a hybrid capacity



To Apply

Please send the following to 



Your resume

- A short summary of your experience with Australian construction companies, if you can share the business name that would be good

- The systems/software you have used

- Examples of the processes or operations you have supported

- Your expected salary/rate

title: Full-Time Video Editor & AI Content Creator
description:
Background



We’re a fast-growing social media agency producing high-performing short-form content across Instagram,
, YouTube, and more.



We’re hiring a full-time AI Video Specialist to create raw AI clips and assemble them into polished short-form videos using our internal workflows.



This is an execution role. Not strategy.

You’ll be given clear briefs, proven systems, and step-by-step Standard Operating Procedures (SOP's) for every task.



If you haven't used every tool on our stack yet, that's okay we'll teach the right person.



What You'll Do



Video Editing

- Turn raw footage into high-retention short-form content (Reels, TikToks, Shorts)

- Add captions, overlays, transitions, sound design, and B-roll in CapCut

- Follow brand guidelines and client briefs exactly

- Apply feedback quickly and accurately

- Deliver a consistent daily output, on time

- Maintain brand consistency across multiple client accounts



AI Clip Generation

- Generate AI video assets using tools like Veo3 and HeyGen

- Execute SOPs precisely (prompts, settings, formats are predefined)

- Quality check all outputs (accuracy, artifacts, exports) before submission

- Flag issues and gaps to improve workflows

- Organize and label all assets clearly for handoff



General

- Manage multiple client projects without missing deadlines

- Keep files structured and easy to navigate

- Communicate proactively on progress, timelines, and blockers



Requirements



Must-Haves

- Proven experience editing short-form content - PORTFOLIO REQUIRED

- Experience with AI video tools (Veo3, HeyGen, etc.)

- Strong proficiency in English (speaking, reading, writing)

- Strong proficiency in CapCut

- Comfortable following SOPs (execute first, revise/polish second)

- High attention to detail and quality

- Able to manage multiple projects without missing deadlines

- Reliable internet and dedicated workspace

- Minimum 4 hours timezone overlap with the team (EST time preferred)

- Coachable, fast learner, and willing to adopt new tools

- Currently working with NO OTHER CLIENTS. All work commitment should be on this role.

- Strong WiFi



Nice-to-Haves

- Agency or content production background

- Strong understanding of short-form performance (hooks, pacing, retention)

- Copywriting experience



What We Offer

- Stable, full-time remote role with consistent workload

- Clear SOPs and briefs, no guesswork

- Training on AI tools for the right candidate

- Direct, respectful communication and fast feedback

- Growth opportunities as we scale

- Performance bonuses of up to 40% of monthly pay (If you perform exceptionally well, larger bonuses will be provided)

- Access to required tools



How to Apply



Include all of the following. INCOMPLETE APPLICATIONS WILL NOT BE REVIEWED:

- Name your application "GROWTH"

- Portfolio or reel (Drive, Notion, or direct links)

- 2–3 talking head edits

No portfolio = no review.

title: B2B Outbound Operations Specialist — Cold Email + LinkedIn (Apollo, Instantly, Sales Nav)
description:
Job overview:

We're a US-based AI consulting firm (Mahlum Innovations, based in Montana) building custom AI operations platforms for mid-market manufacturers. We help 75–500 employee industrial companies replace 10+ disconnected tools with one unified platform. Recent build: a 170-employee, $50M+ Montana manufacturer.

We need an experienced outbound operations specialist to run our cold
 and LinkedIn prospecting full-time. You'll own list-building, sequencing, reply triage, and metrics reporting. You will NOT be doing phone calls — this is async-only B2B outbound for technical and operational decision-makers (COOs, VPs of Operations, Plant Managers).

This is a long-term, full-time role. We are looking to build a multi-year working relationship, not hire for a project.

What you'll do (typical week):



Build and enrich prospect lists in Apollo.io and LinkedIn Sales Navigator (target: 1,000 net-new leads/week, all manually verified)

Upload and manage cold
 campaigns in Instantly.ai (handle variable mapping, sequence assignment, send pacing)

Triage daily inbox replies into 5 categories: interested / not interested / wrong person / unsubscribe / out of office

Forward interested replies to founder's calendar with 2-3 sentences of context per lead

Run LinkedIn outreach: connection requests + 2-message DM sequences (capped at 100 connection requests/week)

Maintain daily metrics log in Google Sheets (sends, opens, replies, meetings booked)

Weekly Loom video update (5-10 min) covering what shipped, blockers, suggestions



Required experience (must have):



1+ year hands-on experience with Apollo.io OR Instantly.ai OR Smartlead OR similar cold
 tools

1+ year hands-on experience with LinkedIn Sales Navigator

Strong written English — you'll be writing reply triage notes and occasional sequence variants in US business English

Reliable internet (50 Mbps+ wired connection preferred) and backup option (mobile data, second ISP, or co-working space)

Quiet, professional work environment for occasional video calls

Comfortable working independently and managing your own daily schedule



Bonus experience (not required, but strong plus):



Experience selling into US manufacturing, industrial, or B2B SaaS markets

Familiarity with Clay.com, HubSpot CRM, Cal.com, Fathom, or Loom

Prior experience with US-based founders or solo operators (i.e., comfortable with async + Loom communication)

Understanding of
 deliverability concepts (warmup, SPF/DKIM, sender reputation)



Schedule:



Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM Philippine Time (1 hour unpaid lunch)

This is your day shift. Aligns with US Mountain Time evening — perfect for handing off positive replies to the founder for next-morning call booking.

13 paid Philippine holidays + 10 days PTO/year + 13th month bonus



Compensation:



$1,200 USD/month base salary, paid bi-weekly via Wise or Payoneer (you choose)

Performance bonus: $50 USD per booked discovery call beyond the first 5 in any given month

13th month bonus paid in December

6-month performance review with raise consideration to $1,400/mo if KPIs are met

Tools provided: Apollo, Instantly, Sales Nav seat, Google Workspace, Loom, Slack



90-day KPIs:



Month 1: 2,000
s sent, 5 discovery calls booked

Month 2: 5,000
s sent, 12 discovery calls booked

Month 3: 8,000
s sent, 20+ discovery calls booked



HOW TO APPLY (read carefully — applications that don't follow these instructions will be auto-declined):

Send a single message to this job post that includes:



A 60-90 second Loom video introducing yourself and walking through ONE cold
 campaign you've personally run. Tell me: what tool you used, what the ICP was, what your reply rate was, and one thing you'd do differently next time. Paste the Loom link in your reply.

Three sentences max answering this question: "If our reply rate dropped from 4% to 1.5% over 2 weeks, what are the first three things you'd check?"

Your DISC personality profile (link in your OnlineJobs.ph application) and your internet speed test result from speedtest.net (paste link or screenshot URL).

The word "manufacturing" somewhere in your reply (this is a filter to confirm you read this entire post).



Applications missing any of these four items will not be reviewed. Looking forward to seeing your work.

title: Conversion Copywriter for Podcast, YouTube, and Social Media Content
description:
We’re looking for a sharp, detail-oriented Conversion Copywriter to review and refine podcast show notes, episode titles, YouTube titles, and social media copy.



We want someone who understands SEO, but also knows what makes good copywriting. You should know how to turn a decent title into one that is clear, compelling, engaging, and worth clicking. You understand the difference between flat wording and language that pulls people in.



We are NOT looking for someone who simply rewrites content with ChatGPT and sends it back, or asks GPT its opinion. 

We want someone who uses their brain, has strong judgment, and understands what makes people click, read, and pay attention.



What You’ll Be Doing:

• Review and improve podcast episode titles for clarity, curiosity, SEO value, and click-through potential

• Review and improve YouTube titles with a strong understanding of what drives clicks without sounding forced or generic

• Edit show notes for readability, structure, and SEO optimization

• Refine social media copy so it is more engaging, polished, and aligned with the episode

• Strengthen weak phrasing and make content more compelling while staying true to the brand voice



What We’re Looking For:

• Strong instincts for writing titles and headlines that make people want to click

• A real understanding of good copywriting, not just grammar or basic editing

• Solid SEO knowledge, especially around keyword placement, search intent, and title structure

• Experience editing content for podcasts, YouTube, or other digital media

• Someone who can think critically and make smart editorial decisions, not just rely on AI output

• Strong attention to detail and a high standard for quality



>>>>>>>> If you have a habit of disappearing, missing deadlines, or going silent without communication, please do not apply.



What This Is NOT:

• Not an AI-driven role

• Not for someone who only knows how to generate ideas with prompts

• Not a basic proofreading job

• Not for someone who writes vague, generic, low-converting copy



What Success Looks Like:

• Podcast and YouTube titles that are more clickable, more engaging, and more strategically written

• Show notes that are clean, easy to read, and search-friendly

• Social media copy that sounds sharp and actually earns attention

• Content that feels polished, thoughtful, and intentionally written



To apply, please include the following:

• Send me your resume & portfolio

• Include the word savvy on the first line of your application so I know you have an eye for detail

• Tell us how you approach the balance between SEO and writing something people actually want to click

• Confirm that you do not have a pattern of disappearing, missing deadlines, or becoming unresponsive



We’re looking for someone with judgment, taste, and a strong feel for what makes copy work. If you know how to make content sharper, more clickable, and more effective, we’d love to hear from you.

Experience with integrations 
 tools, payment gateways, CRM)

**Energy & Work Style:

Detail-oriented but still moves fast

Positive, collaborative, and easy to work with



???? Rate:

???? How to Apply

Resume

Expected hourly rate

A 1-minute Loom video (required) sharing:

     - Your ClickFunnels experience

     - Funnels you’ve built (brief walkthrough)

     - Why you’re a strong fit



Start your application with: INNERFIRE



If you only know how to build pages, this role isn’t for you.

If you understand how funnels actually convert and can execute clean, functional systems — we want to see it!

title: Digital Marketing Account Specialist (E-commerce)
description:

title: Script Writer & Operations Assistant
description:
We are a fast-growing short-form history channel across multiple social media platforms. We create short, punchy historical videos that explain the engineering, tactics and biology behind the ancient world. We're expanding our production pipeline and need a sharp, reliable person to help run daily operations.



This is not a typical VA role. If you find history genuinely fascinating — ancient Rome, Egyptian engineering, Viking warfare, medieval life — you'll fit right in.



What You'll Do Daily



Research historical topics using approved tools and frameworks

Generate script drafts using AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT) following our proven formulas but add your creative spin.

Submit scripts for approval before production

Record voiceovers in ElevenLabs once scripts are approved

Coordinate with our video editor and track production pipeline

Upload final videos on social media

Respond to comments across all platforms — thoughtfully, not with copy-paste replies

Light admin tasks — tracking, scheduling, reporting





What We're Looking For



Genuine interest in history — ancient civilisations, military history, engineering, biology

Comfortable using AI tools — Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, ElevenLabs or willing to learn fast

Strong written English — comment responses need to sound human and knowledgeable

Organised and reliable — this is a daily production pipeline, consistency matters

Available during UAE business hours or significant overlap

Experience with
, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube uploads is a plus

Video editing or content creation background is a bonus, not required





How to Apply

Send your application with:



A short paragraph on your favourite historical period and why in less than 50 words.

Your experience with AI tools & Scriptwriting

Any content creation or social media management experience

Your portfolio

Start your application with the word - SLSW2404



Applications without the history paragraph and keyword will not be considered.

title: Senior Cloud Accountant (Direct Hire / Work from Home)
description:
Join the team as a Senior cloud accountant at Bean Ninjas USA!



Please don't apply if you're not an experienced CPA with 5+ years.



Bean Ninjas USA is on the lookout for enthusiastic and skilled professionals to become part of our expanding team. If you're passionate about cloud accounting and meet the qualifications listed below, we’d love to connect with you!



Filipino candidate must possess the following (Please do not apply if you do not have the following):



~ 5+years of full-time accounting experience within a BPO or similar environment.

- end-to-end bookkeeping experience including preparation of Balance Sheet and Income Statement

~ Proficient in cloud accounting software and platforms.

~ Strong analytical skills with attention to detail.

~ Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal.

~ Bachelor's degree in Accounting or related field (preferred)

- Has Xero and/or QuickBooks Online experience



Qualifications for the role:



- Full-time work (Mon-Fri) for our US clients within the Philippines working hours of 8 am to 5 pm.

- We also offer flexibility on the schedule at work once you are familiar with the processes and client work.

- Excellent attention to detail and time management skills.

- Team player who would get along well with the rest of the Bean Ninjas team



Specific Responsibilities



In this role, you will look after management reporting and weekly/monthly transaction processing for a portfolio of Bean Ninjas bookkeeping clients.



Bookkeeping Service Delivery



-Uses Xero and QuickBooks Online

-Uses Xero and QBO add-ons and integrations like Hubdoc, A2X, Receipt Bank, Stripe, and Paypal.

-Responds to client queries via our online
 helpdesk software Helpscout.

-Communicates with other staff via Slack.

-You write well: concise, understandable, helpful, professional, and fast. You can build rapport with others solely through your writing.



Remote work

-You’re self-motivated and ideally, have previous experience working remotely and with little direct supervision.

-You must have an excellent internet connection.

-You know how to keep your computer and work secure and private.

-You know the joys of using two monitors (or splitting a big monitor) to do bookkeeping work.



Who are we?

Bean Ninjas is a bookkeeping and financial reporting business founded on Australia’s Gold Coast in 2015.



We specialize in eCommerce businesses and our mission is to create financial freedom through stress-free business finances for our clients.



We have over 16 Philippine tea
mbers here and we are growing!



What’s it like being part of the Bean Ninjas team?



Career development

We believe in developing our team and promoting internally. You will go through an initial 6-month training program and will then receive ongoing training and mentoring. We prepare individual staff development plans for each tea
mber.



Flexible and remote role

This is a remote role and you will have some level of flexibility in choosing your regular work hours, but must generally be online during Philippine working hours.



Benefits

We offer a variety of benefits from 13th-month pay, birthday vouchers, birthday time off, accrued leaves, and Christmas shutdown leave (where everyone does not need to log in to work for a couple of days during the Christmas shutdown which is usually 5 to 7 working days, yet these days are still paid for by the company!), 6-week maternity leave, remote social activities, and pieces of training and up to date certifications for our accountants on various accounting platforms or integrations.



Bean Ninjas is recognized as an industry leader. You will be working alongside Chartered Accountants and CPAs who have come from firms such as Ernst and Young, BDO, and Grant Thornton.



We won the Xero Australia Bookkeeping Partner of the Year Award in 2019 and the equivalent state award for Queensland in both 2017 and 2019.



Applications can be sent to 
 and include a copy of your resume. Please do not apply if you have no relevant experience or are only looking for a project-based role. Thank you!

Storytelling in short-form ads



• Strong ability to deconstruct winning videos and rebuild them into:



New angles

New narratives

New market?specific versions



• Hands-on experience with AI video creation tools

(e.g. Kling 3.0, Runway, Pika, or similar).

• Comfortable with video editing tools such as:



CapCut / Premiere Pro

After Effects (basic is fine)

Canva or Figma for overlays



• Experience with localization for international markets.

• Performance-driven mindset — you measure success in results, not aesthetics.

• Ability to work independently, think creatively, and move fast.



What We Offer

• Competitive pay, based on experience and performance.

• Fully remote work with flexible hours.

(You can work 8h/day, 7 days/week if you want — depending on workload.)

• A young, ambitious, performance-first team.

• Long-term collaboration with growth opportunities as we scale aggressively.

• Direct and fast feedback loop with media buyers — your work directly impacts results.



Ready to Go All-In? Apply Here

Send us:

• A short introduction about your experience with video ads & AI tools.

• Examples of localized or recreated video ads you’ve worked on.

• Mention the word “green” somewhere in your message so we know you read the full description.

• Your portfolio and/or a short video introduction of yourself (optional, but highly appreciated).

Only candidates who are serious, performance-driven, and impact-oriented will be considered.

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
***THIS ROLE REQUIRES PREVIOUS VIRTUAL ASSISTANT EXPERIENCE WITH TRADE-RELATED SERVICE COMPANIES (HVAC, ROOFING, SOLAR, PLUMBING, ELECTRICAL, OR CONSTRUCTION)***



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS:



If you would like to be considered for this role, please complete the following steps:



   1. Use “VIRTUAL” as the subject line of your application.

   2. Include a brief cover letter outlining your relevant experience.

   3. Provide a link to your CV/Resume.



Please note: Applications submitted without a CV/Resume will not be reviewed.



About the Role:

We are looking for a highly organized and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to assist our HVAC office managers based in the United States. In this role, you will provide administrative and operational support to help keep day-to-day office processes running smoothly.



You’ll work closely with our team to handle documentation, process paperwork, and assist with customer-related tasks so our office managers can focus on higher-level business operations. If you enjoy structured work, staying organized, and supporting growing service businesses, this could be a great fit for you.



Key Responsibilities:

• Prepare and process invoices for HVAC services, repairs, and equipment

• Submit equipment warranty registrations for completed installations

• Prepare and file rebate documentation for energy-efficient HVAC systems

• Assist with creating and scheduling social media posts for HVAC businesses

• Provide administrative support to office managers

• Maintain accurate digital records and documentation

• Follow established processes to ensure tasks are completed correctly

• Communicate with tea
mbers to keep workflows organized and on track

• Provide occasional support with customer service tasks when needed



Requirements:

• Strong English communication skills: spoken and written (REQUIRED)

• Previous experience working as a Virtual Assistant, Administrative Assistant, or Process Support Specialist (REQUIRED)

• Experience supporting trade-related businesses such as HVAC, plumbing, solar, electrical, roofing, or similar industries (REQUIRED)

• Experience handling permits, rebates, or documentation for service businesses (PREFERRED)

• Familiarity with creating professional social media content

• Comfortable using common office software and online tools

• Tech-savvy and able to quickly learn new systems

• Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks while meeting deadlines

• Positive attitude and willingness to support growing businesses



Work Schedule:

• Full-time remote position

• 8 hours per day, 5 days per week

description:

Bookkeeping & Financial Operations

title: Amazon PPC Specialist
description:
We are a leading UK paint brand looking for a detail-oriented Amazon PPC Specialist to join our media team. This is a critical role designed to support our global operations across Amazon and various retail media platforms.



You won't just be pushing buttons; you will be the guardian of our advertising account health. While you will work under the guidance of our Senior Media Buyer, you will be the primary engine behind the daily execution, ensuring our campaigns are lean, targeted, and performing at peak efficiency.



Key Responsibilities

Your day-to-day will involve the "technical heavy lifting" required to maintain a multi-marketplace presence:

Campaign Hygiene: Perform daily and weekly account checks to ensure all systems are "go" and budgets are pacing correctly.

Execution: Update targeting, manage bid adjustments, and implement negative keyword harvesting based on performance data.

Bulk Operations: Manage large-scale changes via Excel uploads and the Amazon Ads console.

Reporting: Download, clean, and synthesize data into actionable reports for the senior team.

Campaign Build-outs: Create and launch new campaigns following the structures provided by the Senior Media Buyer.



About You

We are looking for someone who finds satisfaction in the details. You are more than comfortable using excel and the amazon ads console. You understand that in PPC, a small mistake can lead to a massive waste of budget.



Technical Requirements:

Amazon Ads Console Mastery: You are a "power user" who knows where every setting lives.

Excel Power User: You are comfortable with VLOOKUPs, Pivot Tables, and data manipulation. You understand how to use bulk files to save time.

Analytical Mindset: You can spot a trend in a search term report before it becomes a problem.

Process-Oriented: You enjoy following a checklist to ensure nothing is missed, but you are smart enough to flag when a process needs improvement.

Experience: Proven experience managing Amazon PPC (SP, SB, SD).Experience with multi-marketplace accounts is a significant plus.



Additional Technical Nice to Have:

 - Comfortable with using Data dive, Helium10, and Seller Board

 - Office 365 and PowerPoint (Teams etc.)

 - Managed accounts with a large number of campaigns



Process:

The process involves an initial introductory call with the Media Buyer, then a 2nd interview with a case study task. 



Hours:

The role is remote, part time, within 9 am to 4 PM UK Time

title: Software Engineer
description:
Software Engineer

Mid-Level  •  QA/QC Testing Focus





POSITION

Software Engineer (Mid-Level, QA/QC Focus) 



EMPLOYMENT TYPE

Full-Time or Part-Time (Flexible)



WORK SETUP

100% Remote 



TIME ZONE

Mountain Daylight Time (MDT)





SCHEDULE

Flexible Hours 



SALARY RANGE

USD $350/mo Part-time, USD$750/mo Full-time



About the Role

We are looking for a Mid-Level Software Engineer with strong QA/QC Testing expertise to join our remote engineering team. This is a hybrid role ideal for someone who not only builds features but also takes ownership of quality, ensuring that every pull request, release, and deployment meets a high standard before reaching production.

You will work across the full stack, manage code reviews, perform rigorous QA, and leverage AI tools to accelerate testing workflows. We operate on Mountain Daylight Time (MDT), but we support flexible hours as long as you overlap with the team for critical syncs and reviews.



Key Responsibilities

• Develop, maintain, and improve full-stack features using React, Node.js (Express.js), and PostgreSQL.

• Perform thorough QA/QC testing on feature branches and pull requests before merging to staging.

• Read and deeply understand code changes in pull requests to identify regressions, edge cases, and potential bugs before beginning QA.

• Write clear, structured, and reproducible QA reports that include test scope, steps to reproduce, expected vs. actual results, screenshots or recordings, and severity classifications.

• Manage pull requests end-to-end — reviewing, providing feedback, resolving merge conflicts, and ensuring branches are in a mergeable state.

• Maintain and improve CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions, including automated tests, linting, and deployment workflows.

• Use AI tools (e.g., Claude, ChatGPT, Copilot) strategically to generate test cases, analyze diffs, draft QA scripts, and accelerate bug triage.

• Collaborate closely with developers, and project managers to clarify requirements and verify acceptance criteria.

• Contribute to a culture of quality by proposing process improvements, regression test suites, and documentation standards.



Required Skills & Qualifications



Technical Stack

• React: hooks, component architecture, and state management.

• Node.js & Express.js: strong backend development experience.

• PostgreSQL: schema design, queries, indexing, and migrations.

• Git: advanced workflows — rebasing, cherry-picking, and resolving merge conflicts.

• GitHub Actions: configuring and maintaining CI/CD workflows.

• CI/CD: solid understanding of deployment automation principles.



QA/QC Competencies

• Ability to deeply analyze pull request changes (files modified, logic impact, affected user flows) before starting QA.

• Proven ability to write clear, professional QA reports that are actionable and reproducible.

• Experience designing test cases for functional, regression, integration, and UI testing.

• Comfortable performing both manual and automated testing.

• Skilled at using AI as a QA accelerator — drafting test scenarios, summarizing diffs, generating edge cases, and validating outputs.



Soft Skills

• Strong reading comprehension — able to understand technical tickets, specifications, and code changes accurately.

• Collaborative mindset — comfortable giving and receiving code review feedback constructively.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

• Detail-oriented with a bias toward finding issues before users do.

• Proactive, self-managing, and able to prioritize competing tasks in a remote environment.



Nice to Have

• Experience with testing frameworks such as Jest, Playwright, Cypress, or Supertest.

• Familiarity with Docker and containerized deployments.

• Experience with monitoring and logging tools (e.g., Sentry, Datadog, New Relic).

• Exposure to Agile/Scrum workflows and tools like Jira, Linear, or ClickUp.

• Understanding of security best practices (OWASP Top 10, dependency scanning).



What We Offer

• Competitive salary: Up to USD $350/mo Part-time, USD$750/mo Full-time 

• 100% Remote work: work from anywhere; we care about output, not location.

• Flexible schedule: core overlap hours on MDT, but we trust you to manage your own time.

• Part-time or Full-time: choose the arrangement that fits your life.

• Modern tooling: AI assistants, CI/CD automation, and a stack that respects your time.

• Growth opportunities: own features end-to-end and help shape our QA culture.



What Success Looks Like

• Pull requests are reviewed and QA'd promptly with thorough, well-documented reports.

• Merge conflicts and integration issues are resolved quickly and cleanly.

• CI/CD pipelines run reliably, with failing builds caught before reaching production.

• Regressions are rare, and when they occur, they are quickly identified and documented.

• The team increasingly adopts AI-assisted QA practices that you help pioneer.



Application Requirement: QA Process Video Demo

As part of the application, candidates must submit a video demo (screen recording with voice-over) that walks through a complete QA/QC process from start to finish using the tech stack described in this job description (React, Node.js/Express.js, PostgreSQL). The purpose of this demo is to evaluate your technical workflow, attention to detail, communication clarity, and ability to follow a professional QA process end-to-end.



What to Build & Demonstrate

Create a simple full-stack application (any small feature is fine — e.g., a todo list, notes app, or contact form) and record yourself performing the following workflow in order:

1. Build a simple app — Create a minimal application using React (frontend), Node.js with Express.js (backend), and PostgreSQL (database).



2. Set up a GitHub repository — Push the project to a public (or shareable private) GitHub repository with a clear README.



3. Create an Issue — Open a GitHub issue describing a feature, enhancement, or bug to work on. Include acceptance criteria.



4. Branch out — Create a feature branch from main following a clear naming convention (e.g., feature/issue-number-short-description).



5. Create a Pull Request — Commit your changes, push the branch, and open a pull request that references the issue. Include a clear PR description of what changed and why.



6. Conduct the QA/QC process — Before merging, walk through how you analyze the PR changes, identify test scenarios, and execute test cases (manual and/or automated). Show how you use AI tools to assist your QA.



7. Generate a QA Report — Produce a proper, structured QA report documenting test scope, steps to reproduce, expected vs. actual results, screenshots/recordings, pass/fail status, and any bugs found with severity.



8. Merge the Pull Request — Once QA passes, merge the PR into main and demonstrate that the feature works in the deployed or local environment.



Video Submission Guidelines

• Length: approximately 10 – 20 minutes (concise, focused, and well-paced).

• Format: screen recording with clear voice-over narration in English.

• Narrate your thought process — explain the "why" behind your decisions, not just the "what."

• Show the GitHub repository, issue, branch, PR, QA report, and final merge on screen.

• Attach or link the QA report (PDF, Google Doc, Notion, or Markdown is acceptable).

• Include the GitHub repository link in your application.

• Upload the video to YouTube (unlisted), Loom, Google Drive, or a similar platform and share the link.



What We Evaluate

• Clarity of your QA process and how thoroughly you understand the PR changes before testing.

• Quality, structure, and professionalism of the QA report.

• Correct use of Git workflow (issue ? branch ? PR ? review ? merge).

• Effective and thoughtful use of AI tools to assist QA.

• Communication skills, reading comprehension, and attention to detail.

• Overall engineering judgment — not code complexity. A simple, well-tested app is better than a complex, sloppy one.



How to Apply

Send the following to our hiring team:

• Your resume / CV.

• Your GitHub profile link.

• The link to your QA Process Video Demo (see section above).

• The GitHub repository link of the demo project.



We review applications on a rolling basis and respond to every candidate.

We look forward to hearing from you.

title: HR Systems, Reporting & Compliance Specialist

description:

Key Responsibilities

1.? ?Client Success & Retention — Core Responsibility

You will:



Act as the main point of contact for assigned clients

Lead onboarding and clearly set expectations

Manage client communication across WhatsApp, Slack,
, and calls where required

Provide proactive updates before clients need to chase

Respond to client messages within agreed timeframes

Translate client feedback into clear internal tasks

Handle client issues early before they escalate

Track client satisfaction and flag retention risks

Ensure clients understand the value of what is being delivered

Keep clients confident in the process, even when revisions or delays happen

Reduce founder involvement in client communication and problem-solving

2.? ?Delivery & Project Management



You will own the end-to-end delivery of client content packages.



You will:



Manage client content calendars

Track deliverables against client scope

Coordinate between:

AI video team

Editors

Designers

Copywriters

Content schedulers

Ensure each client’s deliverables are moving through the workflow

Identify bottlenecks early and resolve them

Chase tea
mbers where needed

Chase clients where input or approval is required

Maintain delivery trackers in Notion, Google Sheets, or similar tools

Keep internal priorities clear for the team

Ensure work is completed to a high standard and within agreed timelines

3.? ?AI Content Workflow Management



You will work with AI-powered content systems, including tools such as HeyGen and ChatGPT.



You do not need to be highly technical, but you must be comfortable using AI tools daily.



You will:



Help manage AI-generated video workflows

Brief AI video outputs clearly

Review AI videos before client delivery

Spot obvious AI errors, poor outputs, or off-brand content

Request revisions from the team where needed

Help improve prompts, scripts, and production instructions over time

Understand the basics of AI avatar/video generation

Make sure AI content is accurate, professional, and usable for the client

4.? ?Quality Control



You will review content before it is delivered or published.



You will check for:



Brand voice consistency

Accuracy of messaging

Obvious AI errors

Poor visuals or awkward delivery

Caption issues

Formatting errors

Missed client instructions

Incorrect names, offers, or details

Overall professionalism



Your job is not just to “send things out.”

Your job is to make sure what goes out is good enough to protect the client relationship.



5.? ?Social Media Delivery Management — Supporting Skill



Social media management is important, but it is not the main skill we are hiring for.



You do not need to be a high-level content strategist, but you must understand enough about social media to manage delivery properly.



You will help ensure content is published consistently across:



Instagram


YouTube Shorts



You will:



Manage content schedules

Ensure approved content is posted on time

Check captions, formatting, thumbnails, and basic presentation

Ensure posts are clear, professional, and aligned with the client’s brand

Monitor basic performance indicators

Flag what appears to be working or not working

Coordinate improvements with the internal team

6.? ?Internal Operations & Systems



You will help improve the way the business runs.



You will:



Maintain client trackers

Keep workflows and SOPs updated

Improve internal systems over time

Document repeatable processes

Help reduce founder involvement in delivery

Make sure the team knows what needs doing, by when, and for which client

Create more operational clarity as the business grows

Required Skills & Experience

Must-Have



Experience in at least one of the following:



Client Success

Account Management

Project Management

Agency Operations

Delivery Management



You must be able to:



Manage client relationships professionally

Communicate clearly in written and spoken English

Handle client expectations

Stay organised across multiple clients

Manage deadlines and follow-ups

Turn feedback into structured tasks

Chase clients and tea
mbers when required

Stay calm when clients are frustrated or unclear

Take ownership without constant direction

Protect client satisfaction and retention

Keep workflows, trackers, and systems updated

Important but Secondary



Experience with:



Content calendars

Social media scheduling

Instagram,
, and YouTube Shorts

Captions and basic content formatting

Marketing agencies

Content teams

Client delivery workflows

Nice-to-Have



Experience with:



HeyGen

ChatGPT

Notion

Slack

Canva

Google Workspace

AI video tools

Personal branding

Short-form video

Online marketing

Content repurposing systems

Ideal Personality



We are looking for someone who is:



Proactive

Reliable

Highly organised

Calm under pressure

Detail-oriented but fast-moving

Strong with clients

Clear in communication

Comfortable chasing people

Comfortable taking ownership

Able to solve problems without waiting to be told

Comfortable working in a fast-moving, evolving business



This role suits someone who naturally thinks:



“What needs to happen next, who needs to do it, and what does the client need to know?”



What Success Looks Like



You will be successful in this role if:



Clients feel informed, supported, and confident

Clients do not need to chase for updates

Client concerns are handled early

Retention improves because clients feel properly looked after

Deliverables go out on time without founder reminders

The internal team has clear direction and priorities

Content calendars are maintained and followed

AI video quality improves over time

Client communication becomes consistent and professional

Founder involvement in day-to-day delivery reduces significantly

Clients renew because the process feels organised, valuable, and well-managed

This Role Is NOT For You If



This role is not suitable if you:



Only want to schedule social media posts

Need constant instruction

Avoid difficult client conversations

Struggle to chase people

Are disorganised

Miss details

Wait for problems to become serious before acting

Are uncomfortable using AI tools

Cannot manage multiple moving parts at once”











How to Apply (Mandatory)



Please include:



A short introduction

Your experience managing clients or projects

Your experience managing social media accounts

Tools you’ve used (Notion, Slack, AI tools, etc.)

Your experience (if any) with AI tools like HeyGen or ChatGPT

Your internet speed and home setup

Your availability during UK hours



Applications missing these details will not be reviewed.

title: Fullstack Developer (React & Java)
description:
Summary

We are looking for a Fullstack Developer with a strong focus on Frontend (React) to join our e-commerce team. In this role, your primary responsibility will be building a high-quality user interface. You will also work on the Java backend to create and maintain the APIs that power your frontend features, ensuring a smooth and efficient data flow from the database to the browser.



Key Responsibilities

UI/UX Implementation

Develop modular, responsive, and high-performance user interfaces using React.

Translate design mockups into functional web components with a focus on usability.

Backend for Frontend (BFF)

Develop and modify Spring Boot REST controllers to serve data specifically tailored for the UI.

Map database entities to DTOs to ensure the frontend receives optimized JSON payloads.

State Management & Data Flow

Manage complex application state and handle asynchronous data fetching from backend services.

Ensure consistent data validation across both the frontend and backend layers.

Testing & Quality

Maintain high code quality through unit testing of UI components and API endpoints.

Debug issues across the full stack, from browser console errors to server-side logs.

Agile Collaboration

Work closely with designers and product owners to refine the user journey and implement features iteratively.



Qualifications

3+ years of experience in web development, with a clear emphasis on Frontend/React.

Proven experience building and connecting to RESTful services using Java/Spring.



Technical Expertise

Frontend (Primary Focus):

Expertise in React (Hooks, Context, Functional Components).

Proficiency in TypeScript for building type-safe interfaces.

Advanced CSS/HTML skills (Tailwind, CSS Modules, or SASS) and responsive layout techniques.

Experience with frontend state management (e.g., Redux Toolkit, TanStack Query, or Zustand).

Backend (Supportive Role):

Working knowledge of Java and Spring Boot.

Ability to create REST Controllers, Service layers, and use Spring Data JPA for basic database operations.

Familiarity with SQL (PostgreSQL/MySQL) for simple data retrieval and updates.



Tools & Workflow:

Proficiency with Git, Chrome DevTools, and Postman.

Familiarity with Docker for local development environments.

Experience with modern testing tools like Jest, React Testing Library, or JUnit.



Soft Skills

Visual Eye: A keen interest in UI details and providing a great user experience.

Collaboration: Ability to bridge the gap between "how the data looks in the DB" and "how the user needs to see it."

Efficiency: Ability to quickly implement frontend changes that require minor backend adjustments.



***Very important: Do take note that the applicant is required to share their updated CV with appropriate access. Applicants who are non-compliant with this will be automatically ignored.***

title: Amazon Strategic Buyer
description:
Amazon Strategic Buyer

About the Role

We are looking for a data-driven and tech-forward Amazon Buyer to join our procurement team. This isn't just a traditional buying role; we need someone who understands the intersection of e-commerce and cutting-edge technology. You will be responsible for sourcing, inventory management, and optimizing our Amazon marketplace presence using a mix of analytical rigor and AI-assisted tools.

Key Responsibilities

• Strategic Sourcing: Identify and vet high-potential products and vendors specifically for the Amazon ecosystem.

• Data Analysis: Utilize advanced analytics to forecast demand, manage stock levels, and optimize margins.

• AI Integration: Leverage AI tools to streamline procurement workflows, analyze competitor pricing, and improve buying efficiency.

• Marketplace Optimization: Monitor Amazon trends and metrics to ensure our product selection remains competitive and profitable.

• Vendor Management: Negotiate terms and maintain strong relationships with global suppliers.



What We’re Looking For

• E-commerce Expertise: Proven experience navigating the Amazon marketplace and understanding its unique logistics and algorithms.

• Analytical Powerhouse: You don’t just look at spreadsheets; you extract actionable insights. Experience with data visualization or advanced Excel is a must.

• AI-Native Mindset: You are comfortable using (or learning) AI tools to "boost" your productivity and decision-making.

• Negotiation Skills: A track record of securing the best terms while maintaining quality standards.

Bonus Points If...

• You have experience with Amazon Seller Central or Vendor Central.

• You have used AI for predictive modeling or automated reporting.



***Very important: Do take note that the applicant is required to share their updated CV with appropriate access. Applicants who are non compliant with this will be automatically ignored.***

title: Frontend Operations Manager for DTC Ecommerce Brand
description:
Important Note: Please do not apply if you do not have at least 1 year of experience working with DTC or ecommerce brands.





About Us



We are a fast-growing, performance-driven DTC ecommerce brand focused on scaling products through creative testing, fast launches, and strong frontend execution.



We are looking for a freelance, remote Frontend Operations Manager to manage marketing execution, campaign launches, landing page readiness, and creative workflows.



This role is ideal for someone highly organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable working in a fast-paced DTC growth environment.



You will work closely with creative, copy, development, and media buying teams to make sure every campaign and launch goes live on time, accurately, and without avoidable delays.





Company: Try Strawberry

Language: English

Availability: Full-time, 40 hours per week

Time Zone: EST, required overlap from 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM EST

Work Type: Freelance, remote, flexible hours

Niche: DTC / Ecommerce

Payment: $1,000 to $2,000, negotiable





Role Details



Location: Remote with required 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM EST overlap



Reports To: Head of Growth / Head of Ecommerce



Primary Focus: Marketing execution, launch management, and creative workflow



Core KPIs: Launch timeliness, campaign accuracy, landing page readiness, asset delivery speed, and error reduction



Tools: Shopify, Trello or similar project management tools, Klaviyo, SMS platforms, and UTM/tracking systems





Responsibilities



-Own end-to-end timelines for product launches and seasonal campaigns.



-Make sure all launch deliverables go live on schedule.



-Act as the main bridge between designers, copywriters, developers, and media buyers.



-Coordinate the full launch cycle from creative briefing to live deployment.



-Source, organize, and manage marketing assets for pre-landers, landing pages, and campaign needs.



-Test
 flows, SMS campaigns, tracking links, and launch assets before paid media goes live.



-Run final QA checks on landing pages, product pages, links, pricing, bundles, offers, and checkout flow.



-Manage hands-on Shopify updates, including product pages, SKUs, pricing changes, bundles, and marketing app integrations.



-Keep Trello or similar task boards organized and updated for clear launch visibility.



-Identify workflow bottlenecks and improve systems across creative and marketing operations.



-Work with media buyers to make sure frontend readiness supports scaling plans.





Must-Haves



-At least 1 year of DTC or ecommerce experience.



-Strong Shopify experience, including product setup, landing page updates, and app integrations.



-Experience using Trello or similar project management tools in fast-moving teams.



-3+ years of experience in DTC marketing operations, ecommerce operations, or creative agency project management.



-Strong understanding of digital marketing launch workflows, including pre-landers, creatives, tracking,
 flows, and SMS.



-Excellent organization, timeline management, and attention to detail.



-Experience coordinating cross-functional teams across creative, development, and media buying.



-Reliable availability with 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM EST overlap.





Nice To Haves



-Experience working with 7-figure monthly ad spend accounts.



-Basic understanding of CRO principles and landing page psychology.



-Familiarity with Klaviyo and SMS platforms.



-Experience building QA systems for campaign and launch readiness.



-Process-building mindset with experience improving operational workflows.





Benefits



-Remote role with flexible hours and defined EST overlap.



-High-impact ownership of marketing execution for a scaling DTC brand.



-Direct collaboration with growth, paid media, and creative leadership.



-Opportunity to improve and build structured launch systems.



-Competitive, experience-based compensation with a 6-month contract and potential extension.

title: Social Media & Community Growth Manager (E-commerce)
description:
About Us

We are a fast-growing e-commerce company selling premium products on Amazon and Shopify, currently managing three brands with exciting expansion ahead.

For the past 10 years, we’ve built a strong foundation on Amazon. Now, we are entering a new phase which is building a powerful brand presence beyond the marketplace.

We are not just looking to “post content.”

We are looking to build a brand, a community, and a revenue-driving social media engine.



About the Role

This is not a traditional social media role.

We are looking for someone who will take full ownership of our social media, build it from the ground up, and turn it into a key growth channel for the business.

You will be responsible for:

Creating content

Driving engagement

Building relationships

Leading outreach

Growing a community

And ultimately, driving traffic and sales

If you are someone who waits for direction, this role is not for you.

If you are someone who takes initiative, executes fast, and figures things out, you will thrive here.







What Success Looks Like (First 90 Days)

Launch a consistent, high-quality content engine (especially TikTok & Instagram)

Build a reliable UGC pipeline with creators producing content weekly

Establish relationships with 20+ micro-influencers and ambassadors

Create content that clearly connects product use to customer value

Drive measurable growth in engagement, followers, and traffic to Amazon

Begin building a recognizable and trusted brand voice



Key Responsibilities

1. Brand Strategy & Ownership

Develop and execute a clear, cohesive social media strategy aligned with business goals

Shape and evolve the brand voice, identity, and positioning across platforms

Take full ownership of social media performance and growth



2. Content Creation & Execution

Own the full content lifecycle: ideation ? creation ? publishing ? optimization

Create engaging, high-performing content (Reels, TikToks, Stories, carousels)

Focus on short-form, conversion-driven content

Stay ahead of trends and adapt quickly



3. Growth & Outreach (Critical)

Proactively reach out to UGC creators, influencers, and brand ambassadors daily

Build and manage a pipeline of creators for ongoing collaborations

Initiate partnerships  not wait for inbound opportunities

Brief creators clearly to ensure high-quality, on-brand content



4. Community Building

Engage daily with followers (comments, DMs, conversations)

Build a loyal and active community around our brand

Turn customers into advocates and ambassadors



5. Amazon-Focused Social Strategy

Drive external traffic to Amazon listings while working within platform limitations

Leverage UGC, testimonials, and product storytelling to support conversions

Utilize Amazon features like Posts, Storefront, and Inspire where relevant

Understand how external traffic impacts ranking and performance



6. Social Proof & Content Repurposing

Collect and repurpose customer reviews, testimonials, and real usage content

Turn social proof into compelling marketing assets



7. Performance & Optimization

Track and analyze key metrics (engagement, growth, CTR, conversions)

Continuously test, learn, and improve content and strategy

Report on performance and insights regularly



What We’re Looking For

Minimum 3+ years experience in social media management (e-commerce preferred)

Proven track record of growing social media accounts

Strong understanding of TikTok and Instagram growth strategies

Experience working with UGC, influencers, and brand collaborations

You Are:

A self-starter who takes initiative and executes without being micromanaged

A doer, not just a planner

Comfortable with outreach and relationship building

Creative, but also data-driven

Obsessed with content, trends, and what performs

Able to think like a marketer — not just a content creator







Tools & Skills

Canva, CapCut (or similar content tools)

Social scheduling tools

Analytics tools (platform insights, etc.)

Strong understanding of content hooks, storytelling, and short-form video



Why Join Us?

Be part of a high-growth e-commerce company

Opportunity to build and own a brand’s social presence from the ground up

Flexible, remote working environment

Collaborative and supportive team

Perks

Birthday bonus: $50

Employee of the Quarter: $500

10 days paid leave after 6 months + 5 days sick leave 

Competitive salary up to $650 (based on experience)



Working Hours

This is a full-time role (8 hours/day)

You must be available:

10:00 AM – 2:00 PM Romanian Time (fixed)

Remaining 4 hours are flexible





How to Apply

If this role excites you, we’d love to hear from you. Apply here -
